name: ADD YOUR NAME (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Republican obstruction
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
LET US KNOW: CONDEMN REPUBLICAN INACTION ON THE CLIMATE CRISIS >>
| | | [ADD YOUR NAME: CONDEMN REPUBLICAN INACTION ON THE CLIMATE CRISIS >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ra_Vfxvd_)
---

This is serious.

Yesterday, the United Nations released a GUT-WRENCHING report on climate change and its devastating impact on our planet.

President Biden and our Democrats have been working hard to address this crisis, but Republicans are determined to BLOCK our efforts at every turn.

[**So we 're calling on ****15,OOO****grassroots Democrats to rise up and CONDEMN Republicans for their inaction on climate change. Can we count on you?******](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Petition Signature: [SIGN ON >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
| [Sign Your Name >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

This is serious.

**Yesterday, the United Nations released a GUT-WRENCHING report on climate change and its devastating impact on our planet.**

We're deeply concerned, but we're proud to see President Biden and our Democrats working so hard to address this crisis head on.

In fact, we just learned President Biden announced **$5 BILLION** in new funding to help communities all across the country prepare for extreme weather and other climate-related disasters.

But Republicans in Congress are STILL downplaying climate change and denying the science behind it. It's horrible.

And worst of all, they're committed to **OPPOSING** President Biden and our Democrats at every turn.

We're prepared to keep up the fight to save our planet and build a sustainable future -- but we can't get the job done without your support.

**So we 're calling on 15,OOO grassroots to rise up and let us know they CONDEMN Republicans for their inaction on climate change.**

---
[LET US KNOW: CONDEMN REPUBLICAN INACTION ON THE CLIMATE CRISIS >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Thanks,

DCCC
---

Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc.org/contact/) | www.dccc.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

This message was sent to: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates) | If you'd like to sign up for emails in a different account, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/get-updates).

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45439193&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MjMyMzk1NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=45439193&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjA2MjMyMzk1NQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: 99 Senators turned their back on you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HAGERTY
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110900:6OxQbqlNd:m:1:3253819041:937839989660B6E9DCC7B4ECB66AA0DA:r)
---
| Peter,

---
On Thursday night, the **Democrats tried to ram their wasteful, corrupt "infrastructure" bill** through the Senate...

...and **EVERY SINGLE SENATOR but me** was ready to **let them pass it without a fight.** (I couldn't believe what I was seeing, Peter)

So I stood up and fought it. _**By myself.**_

I've only been in the Senate a few months, but never in my wildest nightmares did I expect **_every single Senate Republican but me_ to _betray_ conservative values** like that.

It's clear: we have **TWO fights** to win in 2022:
1. Stop the bleeding... by **defeating the Democrats** and taking back the Senate.

2. Start rebuilding America... by electing a **tidal wave of principled conservatives** who aren't afraid to fight for this nation.

**I won last night 's fight by myself, Peter.** **[But I can't do it alone forever... not without the support of patriots like you.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110900:6OxQbqlNd:m:1:3253819041:937839989660B6E9DCC7B4ECB66AA0DA:r "But I can’t do it alone forever... not without the support of patriots like you.")**

**[Keep me fighting by pitching in $9 or more... and I'll make sure to tell every single one of my Republican colleagues whose side you're on.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58110900:6OxQbqlNd:m:1:3253819041:937839989660B6E9DCC7B4ECB66AA0DA:r "Keep me fighting by pitching in $9 or more... and I’ll make sure to tell every

Join me - back Van Orden TODAY! BREAKING - After 24 years in Congress, [Ron Kind is announcing his retirement from Wisconsin's 3rd District](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ceiuc-ahkdjtlkr-r/).This is a district that Trump won by nearly _**five points** _last year, and the Democrats are clearly feeling the heat with **rising crime, rising inflation, rising gas prices, rising cases of illegal immigration** , and more.The voters are paying attention. clean_body: You need to see this | | | = | | Derek, when James Carville calls Virginia 2021’s most important race, you better believe we should listen. He warned us that if we don’t pick up the pace on our fundraising, “All of Virginia’s progress will be gone in an instant and Donald Trump will strengthen his grip on the Republican Party.” We can’t let that happen, Derek. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s go, Terry \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: James Carville Date: Tue, Aug 10, 2021 at 5:45 PM Subject: We could lose Virginia To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Derek, we’ve got a big problem in the Virginia Governor’s race. Glenn Youngkin is vowing to spend up to $75 million of his own money. You know just as well as I do that TV ads can make or break a close race like this. If Terry can’t compete with Youngkin’s self-funding by building the largest grassroots team in the history of Virginia, Youngkin will use his deep pockets to flood the airwaves. All of Virginia’s progress will be gone in an instant and Donald Trump will strengthen his grip on the Republican Party heading into the 2022 midterms. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, James Carville = Terry for VA PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Ted Cruz
subject: HELP ME END 120 years of Democrat dominance, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)
---
Peter,

Democrats love to virtue signal non-stop, and cancel anyone who disagrees with them. For a long time, it worked.

But now, conservatives know the Left's game, and how to beat it. The key is to be PROUD of our beliefs, ignore the liberal attacks, and tell everyday working-class Americans what we believe -- and how our principles make their lives better.

Now, we're seeing Republicans of all stripes filing to run for office, saying what's on their mind, and defending our shared beliefs.

Let me be clear: The Republican Party welcomes anyone who shares our values. My friend Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez knows that, too. Last year, **Monica fell short just 6,588 votes from winning a seat in Congress that has been held by Democrats for over 100 years**. Had she been successful, Monica would have been the first Latina Republican ever elected to Congress from South Texas.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)
[ THIS IS WHAT REPUBLICANS LOOK LIKE
HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)

Will you please **[chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 right now](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)** to help me end 120 years of Democrats holding the congressional seat she's currently running for?

I encouraged Monica to try again - a 6,000 vote deficit is easily overcome with the right message and enough support. **[Monica has my endorsement, but she won 't be able to pull off a win for Republicans everywhere without YOUR HELP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)**.

Monica has set a personal goal of raising $50,000 before June 30th, and I've pledged to do all that I can to help her realize her goal. **[Will you chip-in $100, $50, or even $5 to help send a Latina Republican to Congress?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)**

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)
We need more people like Monica in Congress; she is living proof of the American Dream. She knows that in America, when you set your mind to something you can achieve it. She was raised by a single mother in a Texas border town, despite the hardships, Monica struck out on her own to realize her own American Dream. Armed with her faith and support from her Mother, Monica grew up to become one of the top insurance agents in South Texas.

We need people like Monica in Congress. A woman who knows what hard work is; a woman who has the perseverance and grit to deliver for her community.

**Republicans only need to pick up FIVE seats next year to win back the House, and I can tell you that Monica 's race is one of the best chances we have at flipping a BLUE seat RED!**

On behalf of my friend Monica, **[I'm asking you to give generously](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)** - whatever that means to you. Monica will represent our entire Party in the House, and she'll make us all proud.

[ HELP ME GET MONICA TO WASHINGTON»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)

Respectfully,
Senator Ted Cruz

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58111126:6UG_IqlN3:m:1:3253819041:C50C9F6EF58EEEA282C19B9F2E97918F:r)

| Paid for by Monica for Congress

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I wanted you to hear this from me, team

body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33873645/300207455/1927938479?refcode=20210811_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmJiOWZiMy1hYmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sWvPjCD1d9l5pIc1aAUUh-sggJuUkWlnGZFJA4Ug3g=)
Friends — In a moment I’m going to ask you to split a contribution between my people-powered campaign and Seth Moulton. But first, I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. Every contribution to our campaign helps us lay the groundwork for a victory in 2022. _But there’s also another reason why this is so important._ **Last month, a Republican with the backing of a $10 million Super PAC jumped in the race, bringing our total number of opponents to FOUR. And just recently, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to hold a rally and directly attacked our campaign.** So I need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 40,000 contribution goal. **My team tells me we are close to our goal, and if we can get there, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask:** [**If you are able, will you split a donation between our people-powered campaign and Seth Moulton? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself because it’s going to take a lot of people chipping in a few bucks at a time to help reach our 40,000 contribution goal. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33873646/300207456/1927938479?refcode=20210811_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmJiOWZiMy1hYmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sWvPjCD1d9l5pIc1aAUUh-sggJuUkWlnGZFJA4Ug3g=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33873647/300207457/-1534947712?refcode=20210811_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmJiOWZiMy1hYmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sWvPjCD1d9l5pIc1aAUUh-sggJuUkWlnGZFJA4Ug3g=)
As you know, losing even one seat means losing the Senate. So I can’t thank you enough for all of the hard work you put into this campaign so far. I’m very thankful to be serving as Arizona’s Senator, and I look forward to working together with you to tackle all of the challenges that lie ahead in 2021 and beyond. Thank you for all that you do, —Mark

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Evers vetoed commonsense election reforms… again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
Friend,

Yesterday, **Governor Evers vetoed six election integrity bills** put forward by Republicans in the state Legislature, which would have strengthened election integrity and increased transparency in Wisconsin's electoral process.

Among the bills Evers vetoed were **SB 203** , which would have explicitly authorized the use of drop boxes to collect absentee ballots and placed various restrictions on their use, **SB 204** , which would have prevented bad actors from abusing "indefinitely confined" status to avoid showing photo ID, and **SB 210** , which would have allowed election observers to be no more than three feet from tables at which voting activities are occurring.
As we said in our statement yesterday, **all state elected officials, regardless of party, should want Wisconsinites to feel confident in the results of our elections.** It's absurd that Tony Evers is fundamentally unwilling to engage on the issue of election integrity while Wisconsinites across the state seek commonsense reforms to strengthen voter confidence and prevent fraud. Tony Evers' performative veto is just more of the same partisan theatrics that Democrats have used in their quest to hinder election integrity across the country.

We knew Governor Evers was going to veto these bills -- but the fight to secure our elections is just getting started. Keep up with the election reform bills passed in the state Senate by clicking [**_here_**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58601635:WeAKQXdPN:m:1:2068296031:3F732FA10229DDF259FE5F692812659D:r). To help us fight back, sign up to be a poll worker [_**here**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58601636:WeAKQXdPN:m:1:2068296031:3F732FA10229DDF259FE5F692812659D:r), or join the fight locally by becoming a member of your county party [_**here**_](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58601637:WeAKQXdPN:m:1:2068296031:3F732FA10229DDF259FE5F692812659D:r).

Thank you,

Team WisGOP

**We _must_ make Ron DeSantis a one-term governor -- and _only_ Charlie Crist can make that happen. A recent poll from St. Pete Polls shows that Charlie is leading Gov. DeSantis and is the best positioned to win in 2022!**

clean_body: | | | Derek, Ron DeSantis is trying to build a Florida for Some. A Florida for him, his rich donors, and his friends. Every action he takes, and every decision he makes, is geared toward helping him and his friends. He signed a voter suppression bill into law to help his 2022 reelection chances. He opened the first pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in wealthy Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors. And he failed to lead during the pandemic. We must make Ron DeSantis a one-term governor -- and only Charlie Crist can make that happen. A recent poll from St. Pete Polls shows that Charlie is leading Gov. DeSantis and is the best positioned to win in 2022! DeSantis is also using the governorship as a stepping stone to run for president in 2024 -- and has thrown Floridians by the wayside in the process. Clearly, he doesn’t have Florida’s best interests at heart. But Charlie Crist has always put Floridians first. name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Not exaggerating
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Folks,
Make no mistake, Pennsylvania's open Senate seat is going to be one of the most competitive races of 2022.
The Cook Political Report, a top nonpartisan elections forecaster, lists our race as one of only THREE toss-ups in the entire country.
That means I'm not exaggerating when we say that our fight to hold our Democratic Senate majority will come down to Pennsylvania.
If we're going to pull off a huge win for working people across the country, we're going to need lots and lots of folks to chip in to fuel our movement.
**So we have an important question to ask of you today:**
[Could we count on you to pitch in $3 to our campaign? We just got a new opponent in our race, and it's going to take a lot of resources to stay competitive over the long haul.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33884680/300236339/-353695395?refcode2=191d1aff-bcfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210811-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFkMWFmZi1iY2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ck7X-Q7vU5_y-ZN0rz5rTi5DiPy-sBgAiFuVUFsMYLI=)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33884681/300236340/-353695395?refcode2=191d1aff-bcfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210811-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFkMWFmZi1iY2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ck7X-Q7vU5_y-ZN0rz5rTi5DiPy-sBgAiFuVUFsMYLI=)**
Look, Mitch McConnell and his allies will spend millions of dollars to try and keep this seat in Republican hands.
So it's only a matter of time before dark money starts to flood our race.
Still, if we can bring a huge coalition of folks together to support our fight for justice and equality for all, we will have what it takes to win.
[But here's the truth: We can't do it without you. So please, we hope you will consider making a $3 contribution to our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33884682/300236341/-353695395?refcode2=191d1aff-bcfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210811-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTFkMWFmZi1iY2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ck7X-Q7vU5_y-ZN0rz5rTi5DiPy-sBgAiFuVUFsMYLI=)
Your support means the world. Thanks for being a part of the team.
\- Team Malcolm

* * *

name: Team NextGen
subject: Tell President Biden: Cancel Federal Student Loan Debt
body:
Time for the next step!

| | | President Biden needs to build on this momentum and fully cancel federal student loan debt.
---
| [Send a message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33885004/300238257/1500826631?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzNjMWU0NC1iZGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aO84ixeIrWBARYpv1qUjGbwftl39aDAUnwHaBvnQxSE=&emci=3743f2f9-f7f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=433c1e44-bdfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**Because of organizers and activists like you, President Biden just extended the student loan payment pause until January 31, 2022 — the next step is full cancelation of federal student loan debt.**
This extension provides immediate but temporary relief for Americans who are struggling to balance paying for food, housing, and health care with their student debt.
**Now we must keep the pressure on President Biden and urge him to make this temporary relief permanent by canceling all federal student loan debt. **
Together we showed up to elect President Biden to the highest office in the United States, and this payment extension shows we have the power to affect policy at the highest levels and change our lives and communities for the better.
[**Act Now: Write to President Biden and urge him to fully cancel federal student loan debt to provide relief to millions of Americans, not just for a few months, but permanently.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33885006/300238259/-65257310?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzNjMWU0NC1iZGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aO84ixeIrWBARYpv1qUjGbwftl39aDAUnwHaBvnQxSE=&emci=3743f2f9-f7f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=433c1e44-bdfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
On the campaign trail, President Biden promised to lessen the financial burden of student loan debt on 45 million Americans. **Since these 45 million Americans owe $1.6 trillion combined in student loan debt, we expect him to keep that promise. **
Democratic Senators Chuck Schumer and Elizabeth Warren have called on President Biden to eliminate $50,000 in student debt, and we’re working to make sure President Biden takes this step as he works toward full cancelation.

Student debt is not just an economic issue — it’s a racial and gender issue, too. The weight of student debt falls disproportionately on the shoulders of Black and brown Americans as well as women.
**By fully canceling all federal student loan debt, President Biden will bring us closer to closing our country’s racial and gender wealth gaps. **
Extending the student loan payment pause to January 31, 2022 is a great start — but we’re fighting for the long-term solution.
[**Write to President Biden and urge him to take executive action and eliminate all federal student loan debt.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33885008/300238261/-1987571611?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzNjMWU0NC1iZGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aO84ixeIrWBARYpv1qUjGbwftl39aDAUnwHaBvnQxSE=&emci=3743f2f9-f7f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=433c1e44-bdfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
In solidarity,
Team NextGen
| **NextGen America**
268 Bush St. #2919
San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/3743f2f9-f7f9-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/433c1e44-bdfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzNjMWU0NC1iZGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aO84ixeIrWBARYpv1qUjGbwftl39aDAUnwHaBvnQxSE=&id=109799863)

clean_body: Time for the next step! | | | President Biden needs to build on this momentum and fully cancel federal student loan debt. | | | Friend, Because of organizers and activists like you, President Biden just extended the student loan payment pause until January 31, 2022 — the next step is full cancelation of federal student loan debt. This extension provides immediate but temporary relief for Americans who are struggling to balance paying for food, housing, and health care with their student debt. Now we must keep the pressure on President Biden and urge him to make this temporary relief permanent by canceling all federal student loan debt. Together we showed up to elect President Biden to the highest office in the United States, and this payment extension shows we have the power to affect policy at the highest levels and change our lives and communities for the better. On the campaign trail, President Biden promised to lessen the financial burden of student loan debt on 45 million Americans. Since these 45 million Americans owe $1.6 trillion combined in student loan debt, we expect him to keep that promise. Democratic Senators Chuck Schumer and Elizabeth Warren have called on President Biden to eliminate $50,000 in student debt, and we’re working to make sure President Biden takes this step as he works toward full cancelation. Student debt is not just an economic issue — it’s a racial and gender issue, too. The weight of student debt falls disproportionately on the shoulders of Black and brown Americans as well as women. By fully canceling all federal student loan debt, President Biden will bring us closer to closing our country’s racial and gender wealth gaps. Extending the student loan payment pause to January 31, 2022 is a great start — but we’re fighting for the long-term solution. In solidarity, Team NextGen | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: Team Greitens
subject: Greitens more than doubles next nearest opponent in recent grassroots straw poll for 2022 Senate seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Eric Greitens More Than Doubles Nearest Opponent in Recent Grassroots Straw Poll for 2022 Senate Seat
---
| On Tuesday, results from the 2021 Defense of Liberty straw poll showed Navy SEAL & former Missouri Governor Eric Greitens with a massive lead in the GOP primary for Missouri's open US Senate seat.

A majority of respondents ranked Greitens as their top choice to become Missouri's next US Senator. Governor Greitens was ranked as the #1 choice, more than twice as many votes as his nearest opponent and more times than all of his opponent combined.
This grassroots poll tracks with [polling data released](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00176GuRkOiLFUxYgftdCaSKvNZgfePtW6Z1_Vas19r8ovgcAnzF4Ihb0oIF9V3XSZlp3IcU6sUPz4zBiWGqX-TwdOBatrJG_kiGLCKHwtPuro4fmz9B3xlPWHlnC9CSY6mjJqiYs7TSubdTMifdXvGh4I7XRHQcaE3AVgUISkZ-cLZDLl8rmIbKa_5wyKhRVLrxFZKNOwZwhpecycspCqFrACTp58GsVii5Br02ljnL4oIwz0GsKVDpO01cIhUu21wJuE-mpLrImc=&c=SuqSlO1Jn4wG4M2umyI9m1smgiLWfWOw3mUbMBZLExL1ZsyA-Q8juQ==&ch=ni58a4rodEJrwlr8-v6rDb2NNI9rRXLOXRMCHm97ylmlgPqjjQG88A==) from President Trump's pollster who found that Greitens held a 40+ point lead in the 2022 GOP primary race.
---
|
---
| "I'm honored to have tremendous support from strong grassroots conservatives across Missouri. The reason why we have more than double the votes of our nearest opponent is simple: we are standing up for the facts and we are fighting for the people of Missouri. The establishment has never liked me-- but that's just fine with me," Gov. Greitens said.
---

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I need 5,625 conservatives to sign this before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
While the election may not be this month or even this year - it's imperative we're able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114599:JOX0hqlNR:m:1:3253819041:60BF153DB3D2E6EB93F4DC59AAF1008C:r)
---

Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden is replicating the leadership style of Barack Obama: governing by executive order and strong-arming legislation through the House and Senate, in spite of having the narrowest majorities in DECADES.

**So much for working with Republicans in Congress.**

If we don't start building our coalition now, all bets are off for winning back control of Congress next year. And honestly, America cannot afford two additional years of total Democrat control.

I'm writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need to win a handful of seats to return a conservative majority in Congress](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114599:JOX0hqlNR:m:1:3253819041:60BF153DB3D2E6EB93F4DC59AAF1008C:r)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year - **it 's imperative we're able to begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY.**

That's why before August 15th, **I 've set a goal of identifying [100,000 conservatives](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114599:JOX0hqlNR:m:1:3253819041:60BF153DB3D2E6EB93F4DC59AAF1008C:r) who stand ready and willing to help our team flip the House next November**.

**We have FOUR days until August 15th and so far have collected just 77,500 signatures of the 100,000 signature goal, which means today we need 5,625 conservatives to step forward in order to stay on track toward meeting our goal by August 15th **

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114599:JOX0hqlNR:m:1:3253819041:60BF153DB3D2E6EB93F4DC59AAF1008C:r)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We're counting on you to join our cause.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114599:JOX0hqlNR:m:1:3253819041:60BF153DB3D2E6EB93F4DC59AAF1008C:r)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can't block Democrats' pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November's election - they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114599:JOX0hqlNR:m:1:3253819041:60BF153DB3D2E6EB93F4DC59AAF1008C:r)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114599:JOX0hqlNR:m:1:3253819041:60BF153DB3D2E6EB93F4DC59AAF1008C:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

body:

# [Supporter Survey](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=4627d821fc&e=400a181d5a)
| | | Hi ,

We have a lot of work to do between now and the November 2 special election, and we need all hands on deck. **That’s why I’m asking you to spare 2 minutes to fill out our[Russo HQ Supporter Survey](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=02552411ee&e=400a181d5a).**

The only way to win against the well-funded Trump machine is by out-organizing them in every corner of the district, but that will require your help and leadership. **Your feedback will be used to help structure our organizing program and better personalize our volunteer requests** , because no one knows the issues and priorities of your community better than you. I hope you'll join us in building a coalition that lasts long beyond Election Day!
In solidarity, Morgan

body:
It’s been almost two months since Ras announced his campaign for Governor of Iowa, so we wanted to refresh your memory and share three key things you need to know about him: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33887420/300247991/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210811three_tr_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWJiMjdkNC1jM2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGtdcF7q5AiDKSKLOQRntO3giSeioloUz-pr27C0f9M=)

Team, It’s been almost two months since Ras announced his campaign for Governor of Iowa, so we wanted to refresh your memory and share three key things you need to know about him:
1. Ras has **represented the people of Iowa’s 62nd House District for five years** , serving as the ranking member of the Education committee and founder and chair of the Legislative Black Caucus. Last year, he spearheaded the passage of the More Perfect Union Act to create police reform and work toward racial justice.

2. **Ras doesn’t care about political parties or labels** : he cares about doing good for the people of Iowa, bridging the divides, and bringing folks together to create an even better state we can all call home.

3. Ras is **committed to being bold about the basics** : getting our public schools back to #1 in the nation, investing in climate-resilient agriculture and infrastructure, and creating jobs that help families stop worrying about the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation.

If that’s the kind of person you want to see become our next governor in 2022, we need your help _now._ **[Pitch in $10 or more (our average online contribution is $38.80) to fuel our movement and keep Ras on the campaign trail across Iowa this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33887421/300247994/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210811three_tr_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWJiMjdkNC1jM2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DGtdcF7q5AiDKSKLOQRntO3giSeioloUz-pr27C0f9M=)** **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: It’s been almost two months since Ras announced his campaign for Governor of Iowa, so we wanted to refresh your memory and share three key things you need to know about him: | = Team, It’s been almost two months since Ras announced his campaign for Governor of Iowa, so we wanted to refresh your memory and share three key things you need to know about him: 1. Ras has represented the people of Iowa’s 62nd House District for five years , serving as the ranking member of the Education committee and founder and chair of the Legislative Black Caucus. Last year, he spearheaded the passage of the More Perfect Union Act to create police reform and work toward racial justice. 2. Ras doesn’t care about political parties or labels : he cares about doing good for the people of Iowa, bridging the divides, and bringing folks together to create an even better state we can all call home. 3. Ras is committed to being bold about the basics : getting our public schools back to #1 in the nation, investing in climate-resilient agriculture and infrastructure, and creating jobs that help families stop worrying about the next paycheck and start planning for the next generation. If that’s the kind of person you want to see become our next governor in 2022, we need your help now. = **** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Team Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. Folks, You may have heard that we just passed a bipartisan, once-in-a-generation infrastructure bill in the U.S. Senate. The _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ will invest in repairing our roads and bridges, acting on climate change, accelerating our transition to clean energy, and powering our economic recovery — not to mention creating hundreds of thousands of good-paying jobs. This was a historic accomplishment. But what you may not know is that emails like this one are a big part of what makes our work possible. We rely on grassroots donations of $10, $25, or even $5 at a time to build the community support that makes all the difference to my work in the U.S. Senate. So when we win tough fights like this one, know that your support makes it possible. But our work doesn't stop here. It’s time for the Senate to pass phase two of this plan to make even more long-term investments in New Mexico and our country’s future. I won’t stop fighting to take meaningful action on the climate crisis, like helping every person in our country electrify their home and reduce emissions. **Will you make a donation to our campaign right now so we can build on these wins and deliver even more for workers and families?** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33889249/300255110/630694818?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=MTH_em_20210811b_X_FR_IB_X_ACT_US_all_all_IB_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2QwMWZhNC1jN2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndtuBaI6pIfCG1nT_mSbWe-mbhQGNHeplDUS0Ed5nsk=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33889250/300255111/630694818?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MTH_em_20210811b_X_FR_IB_X_ACT_US_all_all_IB_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5N2QwMWZhNC1jN2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndtuBaI6pIfCG1nT_mSbWe-mbhQGNHeplDUS0Ed5nsk=)

name: Ian Smith
subject: Arrested, fined, and stripped of their business license… just for fighting lockdowns
body:
Don't let left-wing autocrats strangle business any more. Fight with us to stop them once and for all.
| | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ttt763R7639vYqln38fYbPXUWw/ulAzz3WLHmbECEPuNKhjSw) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Patriots for Atilis Gym.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/ttt763R7639vYqln38fYbPXUWw/ulAzz3WLHmbECEPuNKhjSw)**.
---

---
|
---
| | | | | | | | Friend,
---
Arrested, fined, and stripped of their business license... **simply for _fighting back_ against unconstitutional COVID lockdowns.**

Now, **Atilis Gym** in Bellmawr, NJ is the biggest threat to big-government lockdowns.

You might have seen their story on the news over the past 7 months. When New Jersey Gov. Phil Murphy **ordered small businesses to lock down, Atilis Gym _refused_ to give in.**

But now, **Atilis faces over $1.2 million in fines** from the state of New Jersey... on top of **thousands of dollars in legal fees** as they lead the fight to keep _all_ small businesses open.

Here's the straight truth: this fight has _exhausted_ their financial resources and then some. **They are counting on the help of patriots like YOU to help them continue the fight.**

**[Will you join the fight against illegal lockdowns... by pitching in $25 or more to support their legal battle, so small businesses can have their rightful day in court?](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892c6jxgB20VqWVhd2amUwWg/ulAzz3WLHmbECEPuNKhjSw "Will you join the fight against illegal lockdowns... by pitching in $25 or more to support their legal battle, so small businesses can have our rightful day in court?")**
---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892c6jxgB20VqWVhd2amUwWg/ulAzz3WLHmbECEPuNKhjSw)
---
Like many small businesses, Atilis faced a choice: **_lose everything_ at the hands of our tyrannical government... or _go down fighting_ like patriots.**

Because Atilis Gym refused to surrender to his lockdown orders, **Gov. Murphy decided to make an example out of them... launching every disgusting, abusive tactic** he could to destroy their business:
* He **arrested them**... and even one of their customers,
* He gave them **over 60 citations** --including some criminal citations,
* He **stripped them of their business license,**
* He **fined them $15,497.76 every single day**...
* ...totaling **$1.2 million in fines** , and rising _every single time_ they unlock their doors.

Right now, millions of families all across the nation are being _CRUSHED_... simply because America's tyrannical Democrat governors won't let small businesses open their doors and live their lives.

**That 's why they are fighting back...** not just for Atilis Gym but for _all_ small businesses.

If you believe lockdowns are a **violation of our rights** and if you believe we as Americans need to **fight the government 's power grab**... **[We need you to come through for Atilis Gym and for America's small businesses with a donation of $15 or more.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892c6jxgB20VqWVhd2amUwWg/ulAzz3WLHmbECEPuNKhjSw "We need you to come through for Atilis Gym and for America’s small businesses with a donation of $15 or more.")**

**[Will you pitch in $15, $25, or even $50 RIGHT AWAY to help win this fight for small businesses across the nation... and end lockdowns for good?](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/892c6jxgB20VqWVhd2amUwWg/ulAzz3WLHmbECEPuNKhjSw "Will you pitch in $15, $25, or even $50 right away to help win this fight for small businesses across the nation... and end lockdowns for good?")**

name: Team Scheller
subject: Susan Wild Plays Hooky
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS
body:
I couldn't believe it when I saw it. Susan Wild skipped work to play politics with Joe Biden and blamed it on the COVID-19 pandemic. Don't believe m **_Susan Wild Plays Politics Instead of Showing up to Work_** Team - I couldn't believe it when I saw it. _**Susan Wild skipped work to play politics with Joe Biden and blamed it on the COVID-19 pandemic.**_ Don't believe me? Check out the letter she signed below. | |
---
**Due to the Ongoing Public Health Emergency? More like to play politics.**
|
---
**What votes did Susan Wild miss? Well, check out below. **

**S.957 DUMP Opioids** **Act- **This bill requires the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to designate periods during which any individual may dispose of controlled substances medications at VA medical facilities with an on-site pharmacy or a physical location dedicated for law enforcement purposes.
The bill also authorizes the VA to carry out public information campaigns regarding the designated disposal periods.

**S. 1910 Major Medical Facility Authorization Act of 20 21-** This bill authorizes the Department of Veterans Affairs to carry out specified major medical facility projects during FY2021. The bill also indicates the maximum amount that can be spent on each project.

**But don't worry! Susan made sure to designate another Liberal Democrat to cast votes in support of Nancy Pelosi's agenda, like:**
* H.R. 4346, the Legislative Branch Appropriations Bill for Fiscal Year 2022 which includes a _**$582 million increase over this year’s spending levels and follows a budget outline that increases overall non-defense spending by a whopping 17%, while slashing defense spending when accounting for inflation, and allows Congress to hire illegal immigrants for the first time.**_
* H.R. 4502, the Fiscal Year 2022 Minibus Appropriations Package which irresponsibly increases discretionary spending by almost 20% while cutting defense spending significantly when accounting for inflation. These spending increases are on top of the $1.9 trillion partisan funding package Democrats already pushed through Congress just a few months ago, **_and the elimination of the Hyde Amendment, specifically, language that prohibits foreign aid from being used to pay for abortions was omitted entirely._**

Susan Wild has proven what we have been saying all along is true, she is nothing more than a rubber stamp for the radical left and Nancy Pelosi's agenda. It's about time she gets held responsible for her actions, or in this case, not showing up to work!

Onward to victory,

Pierce Frauenheim
Campaign Manager

clean_body: The Democrats are stealing our Democracy! | Hello, Peter! You are receiving this email because our records indicate that you support Republican candidates and causes. To update your email preferences, . | | The Democrats friends in the Fake News Media have done an incredible job of lying and twisting the truth about the so-called “Corrupt Politicians Act,” and we need to confirm whether you’ve heard the truth (or their lies). The Left is on the brink of passing the biggest erosion of our voting laws in a generation, and no one is even talking about it! Thankfully, Senator Ted Cruz spoke out last night and slowed their progress. But if Grassroots Republicans like you don’t start speaking out -- and fast -- it could be too late. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: Please sign our petition today calling on Congress to extend the child tax credit in the reconciliation bill. This is a life-changing policy for our families and anti-poverty efforts.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Yesterday, the Senate passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill.
#

Yesterday, the Senate passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill. This achievement was historic, and it is just the start.
This moment is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to invest in our state and our nation. This first bill will allow us to upgrade our roads and bridges, expand broadband, and bring good-paying jobs to North Carolina.
But there is more to do. A second bill to advance President Biden’s Build Back Better agenda is in the works, and I believe it is critical that it includes an extension of the child tax credit.
[**If you agree, will you add your name to tell Congress to extend the child tax credit as part of the reconciliation bill? Right now, it will expire after only one year, and we cannot let that happen.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33892010/300264563/-886395983?refcode2=1b0b4b06-cffa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210811-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjBiNGIwNi1jZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7a7h1DDye4JBjDjWviwiIfSHsrGUyq72V4529nJgHw=&emci=cd154c55-bbfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1b0b4b06-cffa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20912107)
The second round of direct payments from the child tax credit is supposed to hit bank accounts soon. It will allow folks to breathe a little by giving them some more room in their budgets to buy groceries and school supplies, pay rent or mortgages and cover unexpected expenses like medical care.
This tax cut is helping us cut childhood poverty in half. It will lift nearly 140,000 children out of poverty in North Carolina.
In the Senate, I’ll fight to make this tax cut for working families permanent, but right now, it’s urgent that Congress, at minimum, extends this child tax credit beyond one year.
[**Please sign our petition today calling on Congress to extend the child tax credit in the reconciliation bill. This is a life-changing policy for our families and anti-poverty efforts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33892012/300264564/-886395983?refcode2=1b0b4b06-cffa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210811-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjBiNGIwNi1jZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x7a7h1DDye4JBjDjWviwiIfSHsrGUyq72V4529nJgHw=&emci=cd154c55-bbfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1b0b4b06-cffa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=20912107)
Thank you for adding your voice to mine. Together, we can change lives for the better.
\- Cheri Beasley

name: Marisa Wood
subject: My chalkboard.
body:
| _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33892065/300264785/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2UxYTQxYS1jZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3GPDRxVKrBUSzTBzadBQf6saIu5HJ8v6So6OYazXMg=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ba4f9a13-cffa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/dce1a41a-cffa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2UxYTQxYS1jZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3GPDRxVKrBUSzTBzadBQf6saIu5HJ8v6So6OYazXMg=&id=124172018)._
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33892067/300264814/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2UxYTQxYS1jZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H3GPDRxVKrBUSzTBzadBQf6saIu5HJ8v6So6OYazXMg=)
Friend,

In the classroom, I use my chalkboard to teach important information to my kiddos.

**Now, I'm bringing it with me on the campaign trail to make sure voters know exactly what Kevin McCarthy is up to. The way I see it, he's pandering to the far-right and Trump at the expense of working families.**

Here's my message for voters so you can hear it firsthand:

name: Bruno Amato
subject: "Why do you oppose the January 6th Commission, sir?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress
body:
Kevin McCarthy doesn't want to face the consequences of his actions | | |
---
Reporter Grant Stern was forcibly removed from a press conference for asking Kevin McCarthy a simple question: “Why do you oppose the January 6th Commission?”
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xk9NwEyjAoWg-sb9VIPpLorUws1cKQZiLs2jD2Kw6BsPlI_yR2iW3zkwltPBsi2Hox8-VN8s_U-DiSNVa81GNh-_Rin5cwAwxCWMafpJAxZ6SgYiqNf2Z3joInKtBh-tHt4sNoO9wyCyaotiCBZUituZXl_o2Gpa8loWRQ9kuTjHPXmRhTGyYeHTi23CGrVGfKf9R4YZa8q0Ofgt8Ib478tekJ9wDPuutf6BbluPcay33KuzkKqczCiRoc9Mal3Oa3h4CfvMNHJ_QakDYwUV6jlDLrZcRt5rX_jviRM0QQanUT8VawWlN0ddFAuhJItud2QTBW6uLf16SAi8L3_s_8MuDVUYU99Ng-HvY7aMtmw1DPbm0kpW76TKb-Ap09ZiA/3ed/jymAgat1ToigImip9n-70g/h0/u2XG07oglSxSGdn1EQWle3kF5w_zRggjPRngIDY-wbY)
Folks, this wasn’t some closed press conference in which reporters were only allowed to ask vetted questions. The reporter simply wanted to know something _a lot of us_ have been wondering — **why does the House Minority Leader oppose a bipartisan commission to investigate an attempted insurrection that nearly overthrew the entire United States government?** As a member of that government, shouldn’t Kevin McCarthy _want_ to investigate an event in which four members of Capitol Police were killed and the majority of his colleagues were in harm’s way? **Folks, I’m calling it like I see it — total crap**. Kevin McCarthy has the power to fully participate and embrace the investigation. Instead, he has tried to block the investigation at every turn. Now he’s removing reporters for asking _questions_ about it. **Kevin McCarthy doesn’t want to face the consequences of his actions.** Two weeks ago, his district office in Bakersfield was locked while constituents demonstrated outside and asked for accountability when it came to the commission. This past week, he went to Florida to participate in this press conference and apparently his staff knew he would feel threatened enough to have a reporter forcibly removed. Folks, if I am lucky enough to serve as the Representative for California’s 23rd Congressional District, there’ll be none of this evasion and hiding from accountability. [Representatives should work for the people they represent and welcome questions — no matter if it comes from constituents or reporters. clean_body: Kevin McCarthy doesn't want to face the consequences of his actions | | | Reporter Grant Stern was forcibly removed from a press conference for asking Kevin McCarthy a simple question: “Why do you oppose the January 6th Commission?” Folks, this wasn’t some closed press conference in which reporters were only allowed to ask vetted questions. The reporter simply wanted to know something a lot of us have been wondering — why does the House Minority Leader oppose a bipartisan commission to investigate an attempted insurrection that nearly overthrew the entire United States government? As a member of that government, shouldn’t Kevin McCarthy want to investigate an event in which four members of Capitol Police were killed and the majority of his colleagues were in harm’s way? Folks, I’m calling it like I see it — total crap. Kevin McCarthy has the power to fully participate and embrace the investigation. Instead, he has tried to block the investigation at every turn. Now he’s removing reporters for asking questions about it. Kevin McCarthy doesn’t want to face the consequences of his actions. Two weeks ago, his district office in Bakersfield was locked while constituents demonstrated outside and asked for accountability when it came to the commission. This past week, he went to Florida to participate in this press conference and apparently his staff knew he would feel threatened enough to have a reporter forcibly removed. Folks, if I am lucky enough to serve as the Representative for California’s 23rd Congressional District, there’ll be none of this evasion and hiding from accountability. With you all the way, Bruno If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

| | Derek, **we have just over 5 weeks** until Virginians start casting their ballots for Governor. The list of everything we need to do to stop Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump is staggering:

name: Candace Owens
subject: [Survey] Help me fact-check the fact-checkers >>
body:
---
| | | | | |
| | |
---
| Peter,
---
| Facebook's "fact-checkers" have been CAUGHT **shilling for the Chinese** Communist Party, labeling _true_ **Lab Leak stories "fake news,"** and (in one _shocking_ case) **literally working for the Wuhan Institute of Virology.** Given the power Facebook "fact-checkers" have over Free Speech, **do you believe Facebook should publicly identify who their fact-checkers are ... and who funds them?**
---
| | | | | | [ NO ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114613:J-BU7qlNQ:m:1:3253819041:B24F06EA16C9910420704EF18B7C696B:r)
---
| | | | [YES](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58114613:J-BU7qlNQ:m:1:3253819041:B24F06EA16C9910420704EF18B7C696B:r)
---
| Thank you for your answer, Candace
---

body:
Please take our 5 question survey today | |
---
Fellow Republican,
Democrats have now had control of every branch of government in Washington, D.C. for the past 8 months, and their views on education are just downright alarming. From teaching Critical Race Theory to mask mandates in schools, it seems Democrats want to get involved in every aspect of our lives, including how we raise our children!

But We The People are rightly fighting back! This past summer, you probably saw parents standing up at school board meetings denouncing Critical Race Theory because it is a dangerous philosophy that teaches kids to be judged on the color of their skin. That is wrong!

And there is also a lot of uncertainty about COVID-19. It seems like the Biden Administration keeps changing the science on masks. The science has told us to: not wear masks (2020), wear masks (2020), not wear masks if we are vaccinated (2021), wear masks even if we are vaccinated (2021).

This is why we want to hear from you! Please take our 5 question survey today.

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Even more challenging
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
Last month, CNN named us one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022.
And to make things worse, Donald Trump flew to Arizona to attend a rally where he said, “Taking America back begins with kicking Mark Kelly the hell out of the United States Senate.”
It’s clear Mark needs the help of this grassroots team in order to hold this seat and secure a full six-year term in the Senate.
And it’s become even more challenging now that Trump and Mitch McConnell are already so involved in defeating us — it says they are serious about taking back the Senate.
We need to keep up the pace in order to hit our August fundraising goal and we haven’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped today. So here’s the deal:
We need you to become a new supporter to help us get one step closer to hitting our goal.
Normally most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider contributing $10 we’ll be where we need to be to hit our goal so we can keep Mark in the Senate.
[**So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation towards our August fundraising deadline? We need your help to hit our goal so we can generate the resources to hold this seat and defend the majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210811-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1123_6688874_ex_2DN&akid=1123%2E6688874%2Eex_2DN)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210811-1-subs&t=2&refcode2=1123_6688874_ex_2DN&akid=1123%2E6688874%2Eex_2DN)**
With everyone pitching in just a little more, we’ll hit our goal and be ready for anything that happens, as we work day in and day out to hold this seat and fight for progress that will improve people’s lives.
So thank you in advance for chipping in!
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-aug21?refcode=em210811-1-subs&t=3&refcode2=1123_6688874_ex_2DN&akid=1123%2E6688874%2Eex_2DN)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=1123%2E6688874%2Eex_2DN).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Team Collier
subject: back to school
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
There is a crisis unfolding in our public schools, folks. Next week, thousands of Texas students will head back to school after a year of disrupted learning and virtual classrooms. Yet under Greg Abbott’s recent statewide executive orders, public schools must abide by the following restrictions:
* Schools will lose funding if they offer online or remote learning

* Schools cannot require masks or COVID vaccinations to keep students safe

* Schools do not need to contact trace or inform parents of a positive case in the classroom

**Let’s be clear: Masks, vaccines, and contact tracing are critical to protecting our teachers, students, and staff. They are the ONLY way we can keep our schools open.** Local school boards and educators should be allowed to decide what is best for their school district — whether it’s requiring masks, virtual learning offerings for some students, or vaccine requirements. Any attempt to ban such efforts is dangerous and reckless. Republican lawmakers have forced parents and educators to choose between their children's health and safety or having resources for their classroom taken away. We have the power to prevent many of these cases with masks and vaccines, but Abbott and Patrick would rather Texans get sick and disrupt school learning. **[Their contempt for public education is unconscionable. Add your name to our petition calling on Dan Patrick and Greg Abbott to allow educators to set their own COVID-related requirements:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33895411/300275809/-1608889835?refcode=mc-em210811-covideducation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzUyZjcxOC1kOWZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_getGBlw3Q3_H_sPBeEs5lk1-NIprF0YTW66dZONHBY=&emci=29cbd812-d9fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7352f718-d9fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33895412/300275810/-1608889835?refcode=mc-em210811-covideducation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzUyZjcxOC1kOWZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_getGBlw3Q3_H_sPBeEs5lk1-NIprF0YTW66dZONHBY=&emci=29cbd812-d9fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7352f718-d9fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298)
---
We should empower our educators to make these decisions themselves and provide them with support — not restrict them even more.
Thanks for raising your voice on this critical issue.
Team Collier

Can you[share this petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33895413/300275811/-1608889835?refcode=mc-em210811-covideducation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTc3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzUyZjcxOC1kOWZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_getGBlw3Q3_H_sPBeEs5lk1-NIprF0YTW66dZONHBY=&emci=29cbd812-d9fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=7352f718-d9fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=7689298) with 5 of your friends? clean_body: | There is a crisis unfolding in our public schools, folks. Next week, thousands of Texas students will head back to school after a year of disrupted learning and virtual classrooms. Yet under Greg Abbott’s recent statewide executive orders, public schools must abide by the following restrictions: Schools will lose funding if they offer online or remote learning Schools cannot require masks or COVID vaccinations to keep students safe Schools do not need to contact trace or inform parents of a positive case in the classroom Let’s be clear: Masks, vaccines, and contact tracing are critical to protecting our teachers, students, and staff. They are the ONLY way we can keep our schools open. Local school boards and educators should be allowed to decide what is best for their school district — whether it’s requiring masks, virtual learning offerings for some students, or vaccine requirements. Any attempt to ban such efforts is dangerous and reckless. Republican lawmakers have forced parents and educators to choose between their children's health and safety or having resources for their classroom taken away. We have the power to prevent many of these cases with masks and vaccines, but Abbott and Patrick would rather Texans get sick and disrupt school learning. | We should empower our educators to make these decisions themselves and provide them with support — not restrict them even more. Thanks for raising your voice on this critical issue. Team Collier (P.S. Can you with 5 of your friends? We need to show Greg Abbott and Dan Patrick that Texans will not stand for their recklessness.) The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

| Peter -
This is reaching a whole new level of stupid.
In an [open letter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nnrokO3ShY4-tSA10KGYh0xqkleMxQpQ1Y6DzcwKmPQ1l_Bqn3O7J_SpHh3sm5xMfEIG487Y_5oZK3SBmK0xYjEj5N36kcHlw2D5DEHk99IOIeTNbFUxhgViUyGn19nAq7DAUXQqF_-Ke266opyhJocKzqcYRi3RFFmaB_C2ZrnCO1bpQB9EQWHKM4p6hvAskHdxckkY5UA=&c=E2nUb0g7qWWyO0O_VS46ItnznzSw7jCa9uMy5TTQYOugU_szSSxxHg==&ch=fSnGbw3pa_bldpzhSCYXf37NTkUgIDbF1pzsGuheO4nf-b7OlioTuA==) the White House released this morning - Biden is asking OPEC (foreign oil) to increase oil production in order to stop rising gasoline prices.
"Higher gasoline costs, if left unchecked, risk harming the ongoing global recovery."
No kidding.
But instead of asking a Middle East oil cartel to save America - the Biden Administration should stop implementing policies that make every possible attempt to DESTROY American oil and gas.
---
| | | [DONATE. | Cancelling the Keystone Pipeline. Halting domestic oil and gas drilling. Ridiculous electric vehicle mandates.

name: BRAND-NEW PETITION [Left Action]
subject: Petition: "Pass the 'Right to Organize' Act!"
body:
Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [_PETITION: TELL THE SENATE TO PASS THE "PRO" ACT!_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69bc3fc6-e9e0-4672-b909-5a36240fa77f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Hey -- FINALLY, **[we can fight back against Republican attacks on the ability of workers to organize!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ae8301d-64e3-4dfb-a400-500a71b3ef01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land. The Protecting the Right to Organize Act — the PRO Act — has already passed the House. Now the Senate just needs to pass it. But the Senate will not do anything unless we make them. The difference between us passing the PRO Act and not is the scale of the movement we build, starting now. **[Will you join Rep. Andy Levin to demand that the Senate pass the PRO Act? Sign our petition today. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td08324ad-261b-4ca6-8cc2-fa748d78ad1a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | [Sign the Petition](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bfd925e-e69c-45bb-9f0c-1145e7a8f4eb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9961b27-813f-40fd-aa88-458c047191db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _(Here's more background about the PRO Act, from Andy Levin)_ The last time Congress passed a law making it easier for private sector workers to form a union and bargain collectively, our country went through a renaissance. We emerged from an economic crisis and built the middle class. Unfortunately, that was eighty-six years ago, in 1935. Since then, our labor laws have made it easier and easier for companies to exploit workers, and as a result, working people are falling behind while CEOs and billionaires get ahead. Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land. The Protecting the Right to Organize Act — the PRO Act — has already passed the House. Now the Senate just needs to pass it. **But the Senate will not do anything unless we make them. The difference between us passing the PRO Act and not is the scale of the movement we build, starting now.** [**Will you join me to demand that the Senate pass the PRO Act? Sign our petition today.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a1942ea-9ee4-45a7-a6d3-62939dbe3adb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Helping working people build power has been core to my career since I started working with SEIU to help nursing home workers organize in the 1980s. And now, the PRO Act is a core priority of mine in Congress. **There’s basically no chance for us to rebuild the middle class in this country, or to get justice for poor and working-class people, unless workers are free to form unions and bargain collectively. And the PRO Act will do so much to shift the balance for workers.** The PRO Act does away with what I call ‘right-to-freeload,’ or so-called ‘right-to-work,’ a Jim Crow relic designed to prevent Black and white workers from organizing together, to keep Black workers down, to keep workers divided and to weaken workers’ organizations. Under the PRO Act, workers and their unions would choose whether to vote in a union election at work, at a neutral location, or electronically. The PRO Act accelerates timelines for union elections, so management would have less time to interfere with workers’ choices. The PRO Act forbids mandatory anti-union propaganda meetings. For the first time since 1947, workers from other companies could act in solidarity with each other under the PRO Act. The PRO Act is better, more comprehensive, stronger than any effort at labor law reform in decades. We just need the Senate to pass it. Because Joe Biden is ready to sign it! **We need people to rise up and demand that Congress liberate the working people of America. Change doesn’t start from the top — it comes only from raising all of our voices. We need you to ensure our Senators have no option but to act.** [**Help build the movement. clean_body: Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Hey -- FINALLY, Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land. The Protecting the Right to Organize Act — the PRO Act — has already passed the House. Now the Senate just needs to pass it. But the Senate will not do anything unless we make them. The difference between us passing the PRO Act and not is the scale of the movement we build, starting now. | | | | | (Here's more background about the PRO Act, from Andy Levin) The last time Congress passed a law making it easier for private sector workers to form a union and bargain collectively, our country went through a renaissance. We emerged from an economic crisis and built the middle class. Unfortunately, that was eighty-six years ago, in 1935. Since then, our labor laws have made it easier and easier for companies to exploit workers, and as a result, working people are falling behind while CEOs and billionaires get ahead. Right now, we have the best chance in decades to change our labor laws and open up a new era of worker power across the land. The Protecting the Right to Organize Act — the PRO Act — has already passed the House. Now the Senate just needs to pass it. But the Senate will not do anything unless we make them. The difference between us passing the PRO Act and not is the scale of the movement we build, starting now. Helping working people build power has been core to my career since I started working with SEIU to help nursing home workers organize in the 1980s. And now, the PRO Act is a core priority of mine in Congress. There’s basically no chance for us to rebuild the middle class in this country, or to get justice for poor and working-class people, unless workers are free to form unions and bargain collectively. And the PRO Act will do so much to shift the balance for workers. The PRO Act does away with what I call ‘right-to-freeload,’ or so-called ‘right-to-work,’ a Jim Crow relic designed to prevent Black and white workers from organizing together, to keep Black workers down, to keep workers divided and to weaken workers’ organizations. Under the PRO Act, workers and their unions would choose whether to vote in a union election at work, at a neutral location, or electronically. The PRO Act accelerates timelines for union elections, so management would have less time to interfere with workers’ choices. The PRO Act forbids mandatory anti-union propaganda meetings. For the first time since 1947, workers from other companies could act in solidarity with each other under the PRO Act. The PRO Act is better, more comprehensive, stronger than any effort at labor law reform in decades. We just need the Senate to pass it. Because Joe Biden is ready to sign it! We need people to rise up and demand that Congress liberate the working people of America. Change doesn’t start from the top — it comes only from raising all of our voices. We need you to ensure our Senators have no option but to act. Let’s pass the PRO Act. It starts with you. Andy | | | | | | | Want to take action on another front? . If you can, make a donation to help us cover expenses. | | | | | | | | Take action, fight back, and make change happen! subject: Ron Johnson had sold his vote on the Trump tax scam, and now we know why

body:
The news just broke that in exchange for Ron Johnson’s vote on Trump’s tax scam, the bill must sweeten the tax break for his ultra wealthy donors’ corporations. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33896617/300279430/-838859516?refcode=EM_FR_210811tax_N_drj_90DA_7_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmM0YzEzZC1kZGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gTLsZPNygmw8yDGPk2WpxHY_ehnsJictBlNAB9QLfbQ=)

| Peter, the news just broke that in exchange for Ron Johnson’s vote on Trump’s tax scam, the bill had to sweeten the tax break for his ultra wealthy donors’ corporations.

**We always knew that Ron Johnson had sold his vote on the Trump tax scam, now we know that he did it specifically so his two biggest campaign funders would save millions in tax breaks.**

Corporations should earn their tax cuts by paying their workers family-sustaining wages and sourcing their supply chains here in America, not by paying off Ron Johnson.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: It's Biden 🇨🇳 vs. America 🇺🇸 - Serious Situation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Our movement is growing |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=85d8f6b10c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the State Representative in Arizona responsible for kickstarting the Election Integrity movement in Arizona – with help from America First, grassroots people all across America like you and me! [_Donate now to join our movement!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1d82072aba&e=44b8c466b0)

**Want proof? It’s spreading like wildfire!**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a973310c8a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **We are seeing unprecedent numbers flock to the #ProveIt movement! **

_We’ve done the work, we have shown the evidence._

[_If you want the Democrats to prove there was no fraud, donate HERE!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2514c8dddf&e=44b8c466b0)

**I have been fighting election fraud from the BEGINNING. And I want to continue the fight for YOU!**

The Secretary of State Races are going to be some of the most important in America in 2022.

**Why?**

Because they oversee the elections! This is why I am so proud to be the favorite, pro-Trump candidate to run for Secretary of State in Arizona!

**We need a strong Secretary of State in Arizona that will stand up to the bullies...**

Like the Biden administration...
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=20101d0402&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Can you believe that the Biden administration is threatening to lock up Republicans who want them to #ProveIt?

**This is what silencing political enemies looks like.**

_Conservative Brief_ reports:

_The U.S. Department of Justice is now telling states that they should not pursue their own Arizona-style election audits._

_The DOJ’s new guidance document claims that undertaking “partisan” election audits could violate federal law, which seems like a clear statement directed at Republicans who support audits in states._

_“The guidance document explicitly warns against audits in which election officials are forced to turn over materials like ballots or voting machines to state lawmakers or third parties — as in Arizona, whose audit is being run by the private company Cyber Ninjas,” Forbes reported._

_“There are federal or criminal penalties attached,” the guidance asserts._

_Biden’s DOJ then suggests that those who carry out audits of the 2020 election “can face fines of up to $1,000 and imprisonment of up to one year for each violation.”_

**But I have been vocal, and I have been standing up and fighting against the Biden Administration and his cronies like Attorney General Merrick Garland.**

**The article continues:**

_Arizona Rep. Mark Finchem, who is now running for Arizona Secretary of State to replace Democrat Katie Hobbs, recently warned Attorney General Merrick Garland against getting involved in Arizona._

_“I got news for Merrick Garland, there’s this little thing called the Constitution,” said Finchem. “Article I, section IV, the times, places, and manner of holding an election for senators and representatives... it is the legislature that has responsibility for nominating and naming the electors for President.”_

_“I would advise Merrick Garland and his team of thugs that now occupy the Department of Justice: Tread very lightly,” he added._

_Finchem said: “Our attorney general, I spoke with their representative this morning, I’m not going to put him on the hook for anything, but you’re going to walk into a very surprising reception if you try to do anything in this state that interferes with legislative authority in handling our elections. Hard stop.”_

**To anyone who wants to mess with election integrity, to anyone who wants to stop the greatest grassroots movement in America, and to anyone who wants to interfere with America’s Audit in Maricopa County, I have exactly two words for you.**

__Tread lightly.__

_Help me stand up for you and election integrity by supporting my campaign for Secretary of State. [Please donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=54d4315d1e&e=44b8c466b0)_

**I’m reminded of Lee Greenwood’s famous lyrics today:**

_I’m proud to be an American, where at least I know I’m free._

I want you to ask yourself one question. _In a world where you can be incarcerated for up to one year for protecting the integrity of our elections, are you truly free?_

**If so, what is freedom? And if not, what will you do to defend it?**

_[Donate today to make these lyrics true again.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2badd43b3f&e=44b8c466b0) Let’s defend freedom together._
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6806ebb20b&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e39f710743&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |

Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
