clean_body: I applaud these women | Friend, Yesterday, the Governor of New York Andrew Cuomo resigned due to CONFIRMED allegations that he sexually harassed 11 known women. This is the same person that the left-wing media has been calling on for years to run for President, this is the Governor who sent 15,000 people to their death beds and then won an Emmy for it, and this is the same man who chastised Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh by saying we must believe all women. The Democrats have always been held to their own standards. They never have to deal with any real repercussions, until now! Help me hold Cuomo and the Democrats accountable by chipping in $5, $10, or even $20 to our campaign. () CHIP-IN $5 () CHIP-IN $10 () CHIP-IN $20 () CHIP-IN $50 () CHIP-IN A DIFFERENT AMOUNT () As a mother and a woman, I cannot imagine what these women went through and the fact that our current Congresswoman has stayed silent is saddening. We need to elect leaders that will hold everyone to the same standard. And when we elect women into leadership positions, we need women that will stand up for women. Join me in holding Cuomo and the rest of the Democrats accountable by chipping in $5, $10, or $20 today. name: Tiffany
subject: We won't stop talking about this
body:
Our safety should be a priority!
---
| | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email.
---
| |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fkfK4MiVn0u6IYVYC7z2nN8-LklY6rqWNIAVMr-AkhLvzOZ5a6Mqh5SXhIgWxxd9lY7EaSN61ejZihv2NTj9Vx-uDooUnLBD6okni5LvOvSN8ONjMvx3zb1dpc-ElMdijRWigJc6KA0V7-RNhO6bvLqSoAFsxxlVJj3mRG82mZJXsEVUhvvP_Nh60_liGqGDW2Cl-WPxqsMj6j1dadQpGg==&c=he9-X9AU2mC1cZEocq3G2bjrrkaQtPL4-Zm6Kga4njPO1eadW1zkVg==&ch=s_Vs_4Roak_e9oZYKw5sYO1gUq_AQN50_k_qDEUCvjea0p15YbK8-g==)
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Friends,
---
| I know you've heard me say it before - the safety of Washingtonians will always be a priority when I'm serving as your senator.
And while my opponent, Patty Murray refuses to stand up to the defund the police movement and liberal leaders who give a free pass to criminals who destroy our streets, things only continue to get worse.
Since 2016, the Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs report that there has been a 66.9% increase in murders. In fact, we are rated LAST out of all 50 states and DC for the number of officers per capita... and just last week, King County Sheriff, Mitzi Johanknecht told courthouse employees they need to telework due to public safety concerns.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fkfK4MiVn0u6IYVYC7z2nN8-LklY6rqWNIAVMr-AkhLvzOZ5a6Mqh5SXhIgWxxd9lY7EaSN61ejZihv2NTj9Vx-uDooUnLBD6okni5LvOvSN8ONjMvx3zb1dpc-ElMdijRWigJc6KA0V7-RNhO6bvLqSoAFsxxlVJj3mRG82mZJXsEVUhvvP_Nh60_liGqGDW2Cl-WPxqsMj6j1dadQpGg==&c=he9-X9AU2mC1cZEocq3G2bjrrkaQtPL4-Zm6Kga4njPO1eadW1zkVg==&ch=s_Vs_4Roak_e9oZYKw5sYO1gUq_AQN50_k_qDEUCvjea0p15YbK8-g==)
---
| [There is no question - THIS HAS HAPPENED UNDER PATTY MURRAY'S WATCH! ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fkfK4MiVn0u6IYVYC7z2nN8-LklY6rqWNIAVMr-AkhLvzOZ5a6Mqh5SXhIgWxxd9lY7EaSN61ejZihv2NTj9Vx-uDooUnLBD6okni5LvOvSN8ONjMvx3zb1dpc-ElMdijRWigJc6KA0V7-RNhO6bvLqSoAFsxxlVJj3mRG82mZJXsEVUhvvP_Nh60_liGqGDW2Cl-WPxqsMj6j1dadQpGg==&c=he9-X9AU2mC1cZEocq3G2bjrrkaQtPL4-Zm6Kga4njPO1eadW1zkVg==&ch=s_Vs_4Roak_e9oZYKw5sYO1gUq_AQN50_k_qDEUCvjea0p15YbK8-g==)
Without common sense leadership we've seen crime in our communities skyrocket. We know this is because of the defund the police movement - but Patty stays silent. Where is the voice from our senior senator? And it goes deeper than that. We have seen a complete disrespect for police officers over the past year, and it continues to grow. Officer assaults have gone up 67% since 2016. It's no wonder that more police officers left the Seattle Police Department in 2020 than any other year since 2012.
I promise to keep funding in our police departments and I will always protect your family at all costs. [Will you help support my campaign in this fight? ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fkfK4MiVn0u6IYVYC7z2nN8-LklY6rqWNIAVMr-AkhLvzOZ5a6Mqh5SXhIgWxxd9lY7EaSN61ejZihv2NTj9Vx-uDooUnLBD6okni5LvOvSN8ONjMvx3zb1dpc-ElMdijRWigJc6KA0V7-RNhO6bvLqSoAFsxxlVJj3mRG82mZJXsEVUhvvP_Nh60_liGqGDW2Cl-WPxqsMj6j1dadQpGg==&c=he9-X9AU2mC1cZEocq3G2bjrrkaQtPL4-Zm6Kga4njPO1eadW1zkVg==&ch=s_Vs_4Roak_e9oZYKw5sYO1gUq_AQN50_k_qDEUCvjea0p15YbK8-g==)
---
| | | [DONATE NOW!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fkfK4MiVn0u6IYVYC7z2nN8-LklY6rqWNIAVMr-AkhLvzOZ5a6Mqh5SXhIgWxxd9lY7EaSN61ejZihv2NTj9Vx-uDooUnLBD6okni5LvOvSN8ONjMvx3zb1dpc-ElMdijRWigJc6KA0V7-RNhO6bvLqSoAFsxxlVJj3mRG82mZJXsEVUhvvP_Nh60_liGqGDW2Cl-WPxqsMj6j1dadQpGg==&c=he9-X9AU2mC1cZEocq3G2bjrrkaQtPL4-Zm6Kga4njPO1eadW1zkVg==&ch=s_Vs_4Roak_e9oZYKw5sYO1gUq_AQN50_k_qDEUCvjea0p15YbK8-g==)
---
| Police officers need to know that we are behind them 100%. Without this, they will continue to leave, our crime rates will continue to increase, and our families will continue to feel unsafe. For our sheriff's office to say the courthouse complex is too dangerous for staff to come to work is simply unacceptable - the situation is out of hand.
This is a failure of leadership from the top, and if Senator Murray wants to be lauded for her seniority in Washington, DC then she needs to be held responsible for the failures she's been complicit to here in Washington State.
---

clean_body: Our safety should be a priority! | | | | | | You're receiving this message because you signed up to receive emails from Smiley for Washington. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can unsubscribe at the bottom of this email. | | == | | | Dear Friends, | I know you've heard me say it before - the safety of Washingtonians will always be a priority when I'm serving as your senator. And while my opponent, Patty Murray refuses to stand up to the defund the police movement and liberal leaders who give a free pass to criminals who destroy our streets, things only continue to get worse. Since 2016, the Washington Association of Sheriffs and Police Chiefs report that there has been a 66.9% increase in murders. In fact, we are rated LAST out of all 50 states and DC for the number of officers per capita... and just last week, King County Sheriff, Mitzi Johanknecht told courthouse employees they need to telework due to public safety concerns. | == | == Without common sense leadership we've seen crime in our communities skyrocket. We know this is because of the defund the police movement - but Patty stays silent. Where is the voice from our senior senator? And it goes deeper than that. We have seen a complete disrespect for police officers over the past year, and it continues to grow. Officer assaults have gone up 67% since 2016. It's no wonder that more police officers left the Seattle Police Department in 2020 than any other year since 2012. I promise to keep funding in our police departments and I will always protect your family at all costs. == | | | == | Police officers need to know that we are behind them 100%. Without this, they will continue to leave, our crime rates will continue to increase, and our families will continue to feel unsafe. For our sheriff's office to say the courthouse complex is too dangerous for staff to come to work is simply unacceptable - the situation is out of hand. This is a failure of leadership from the top, and if Senator Murray wants to be lauded for her seniority in Washington, DC then she needs to be held responsible for the failures she's been complicit to here in Washington State. | | | == | Stand with me! | == | Tiffany Smiley | | | | | | | Smiley for Washington, Inc. | P.O. BOX 1058, Richland, WA 99352 | | Sent by mailto:tiffany@smileyforwashington.com powered by

name: John Castorani
subject: Now that we're parents, we've had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
I'm running for Congress because as a new father, I can no longer fight battles in foreign countries. So, I'm turning my attention to Congress Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5affbcda554b4ecaa80b1983b524543a&_e=QsUW3lnLriX8QhDtr0PVl8GSKCvoa1eEx33JZnvHYbmR3tR6EdRq0-BJgTNP1lopf4kKC13sZ-BXHmJt6dQ7wV2lZmZ3aTiCC6djJpXG_zhyw8m23FzKY7hN3ROYzKXQBOvQdgZXJdttX8u-zyl5nzZJbgUuNUhtb70StyQ03sHAtarGJjHmNRuu_4D7yZgMWn4f2L6C11nimbYQc6tGM4e4ogr-z_WrIDllvnTnNX1vvNsbIg-RGemrhmpBZPsDFZLT-0wI-t9cjU_0gwUXTU8kzgVqsGEhLzF75x7BsP3e4Ow_W39dHkx6u5DrheWKxoEYHrwd5dOBuZl8fCJ1-3Qo_pHqhbMid4PFJNmda7mGt4uT3mbnO8NAK3ixe8VIH3xJDHDuLGIr9NNJlNMVUQ47VYv53IVTaDRTfnKEX5XxIcuPKCVy_HBc4nIECesy6fWcNPhDYut0NryMCIftVPOket5JLgGU30VQs83CFPs%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5affbcda554b4ecaa80b1983b524543a&_e=QsUW3lnLriX8QhDtr0PVl8GSKCvoa1eEx33JZnvHYbmR3tR6EdRq0-BJgTNP1lopf4kKC13sZ-BXHmJt6dQ7wV2lZmZ3aTiCC6djJpXG_zhyw8m23FzKY7hN3ROYzKXQBOvQdgZXJdttX8u-zyl5nzZJbgUuNUhtb70StyQ03sHAtarGJjHmNRuu_4D7yZgMWn4f2L6C11nimbYQc6tGM4e4ogr-z_WrIDllvnTnNX1vvNsbIg-RGemrhmpBZPsDFZLT-0wI-t9cjU_0gwUXTR78tSReN5V8B8v8oKhmcEXUtixuul_8qrAYBzAl9vZ77UnBnn6xaiczN_02SiscpuoJ15Tf-B2Lto_zhCU2VZ1FQXx7ULNz361XLiCpIjYi-ADMFam3t13OpmGTcXvdGI_0argtCmeXICMWFLWrfIH_B6nCtRuk_ErdtGiFmx_D9qFMYOiXmm5CbzZtVaAgPS7Cl4740gx60uhv--j-OCo%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5affbcda554b4ecaa80b1983b524543a&_e=QsUW3lnLriX8QhDtr0PVl8GSKCvoa1eEx33JZnvHYbmR3tR6EdRq0-BJgTNP1lopf4kKC13sZ-BXHmJt6dQ7wV2lZmZ3aTiCC6djJpXG_zhyw8m23FzKY7hN3ROYzKXQBOvQdgZXJdttX8u-zyl5nzZJbgUuNUhtb70StyQ03sHAtarGJjHmNRuu_4D7yZgMWn4f2L6C11nimbYQc6tGM4e4ogr-z_WrIDllvnTnNX1vvNsbIg-RGemrhmpBZPsDFZLT-0wI-t9cjU_0gwUXTaTxmIKLfCjlu9vgjwaXdfR6XU-JswPRiGXlaO-fXDDsToGUKMNFziiQNbMnp4ViukfLbSNc61ykuhju9GP5Nva_NFCgjytG-Lxy-iO5vxbDpINNUZuQU08-ZD96QiLoO07E_m5bVQ2oydjvjHkofs3PI3NUV_Ju-lBAsWD6UhfBi8GkCUqGJsPBMXYKvG1H0tNBzGB0T7U81l8QQby0uEQ%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5affbcda554b4ecaa80b1983b524543a&_e=QsUW3lnLriX8QhDtr0PVl8GSKCvoa1eEx33JZnvHYbmR3tR6EdRq0-BJgTNP1lopf4kKC13sZ-BXHmJt6dQ7wV2lZmZ3aTiCC6djJpXG_zhyw8m23FzKY7hN3ROYzKXQBOvQdgZXJdttX8u-zyl5nzZJbgUuNUhtb70StyQ03sHAtarGJjHmNRuu_4D7yZgMWn4f2L6C11nimbYQc6tGM4e4ogr-z_WrIDllvnTnNX1vvNsbIg-RGemrhmpBZPsDFZLT-0wI-t9cjU_0gwUXTWcQ3TGkU_tlNlotAGRFQ8f0oRaQqaDUUNoodAcRCRdn04Wx2gb1u0_EbvsQ0LJdBF4-B4zsrpfdxWg7inAyr3vaV1TqqC4-IcFEDXA2Dp1j7daKjC_d23Mretuk1VS3dShNaZm4RsBjrWFtHshTYjJnlVXEyv04a7W6I9H97hQhwHzbyMTGpzyWoFX8Y-nR9z_Saje96sLuiyZyTQ2PrBQ%3D)**.

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5affbcda554b4ecaa80b1983b524543a&_e=QsUW3lnLriX8QhDtr0PVl8GSKCvoa1eEx33JZnvHYbmR3tR6EdRq0-BJgTNP1lopf4kKC13sZ-BXHmJt6dQ7wV2lZmZ3aTiCC6djJpXG_zhyw8m23FzKY7hN3ROYzKXQBOvQdgZXJdttX8u-zyl5nzZJbgUuNUhtb70StyQ03sHAtarGJjHmNRuu_4D7yZgMWn4f2L6C11nimbYQc6tGM4e4ogr-z_WrIDllvnTnNX1vvNsbIg-RGemrhmpBZPsDFZLT-0wI-t9cjU_0gwUXTX_AiIj1q_N8QJVsZk1wfJMJtfoeHIjBzpX6Q43HPPzpsFMcYf_KVuffEYMgFvV-guvPSXu-rmpmz3fSsQlF9zNh8GNKayIggnOWCKrcHgOE3feShNexmdevtCpo6F6872pA8tVRfmpD_u7-DJYYl9fH5ICIL9Ouhge9_swEwCn7vBuSbNeM_xOno2YoXJbM66OBNstN6v7wn7pz0W9I1Qw%3D)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5affbcda554b4ecaa80b1983b524543a&_e=QsUW3lnLriX8QhDtr0PVl8GSKCvoa1eEx33JZnvHYbmR3tR6EdRq0-BJgTNP1lopf4kKC13sZ-BXHmJt6dQ7wV2lZmZ3aTiCC6djJpXG_zhyw8m23FzKY7hN3ROYzKXQBOvQdgZXJdttX8u-zyl5nzZJbgUuNUhtb70StyQ03sHAtarGJjHmNRuu_4D7yZgMWn4f2L6C11nimbYQc6tGM4e4ogr-z_WrIDllvnTnNX1vvNsbIg-RGemrhmpBZPsDFZLT-0wI-t9cjU_0gwUXTb41q7ubt0xHnz18vVlkGDkO5M_OraCRvRB7213CSugzsMD01yWw5ixYQl1HjXl_BBYSW2vap4gi3PkskWTJ4OPEaprZscFVA_fsJBd1aNWKaFPge14WpYyahFpdmmnpIK_LD-JE_L591_grYcza5NyqI5z0OXoz2J3LtvM_WC_NL58e_pKZFWAcoUW8MbJQT-ydjZgD4DhUEbBqHbcvRQw%3D)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won’t you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5affbcda554b4ecaa80b1983b524543a&_e=QsUW3lnLriX8QhDtr0PVl8GSKCvoa1eEx33JZnvHYbmR3tR6EdRq0-BJgTNP1lopf4kKC13sZ-BXHmJt6dQ7wV2lZmZ3aTiCC6djJpXG_zhyw8m23FzKY7hN3ROYzKXQBOvQdgZXJdttX8u-zyl5nzZJbgUuNUhtb70StyQ03sHAtarGJjHmNRuu_4D7yZgMWn4f2L6C11nimbYQc6tGM4e4ogr-z_WrIDllvnTnNX1vvNsbIg-RGemrhmpBZPsDFZLT-0wI-t9cjU_0gwUXTcBaRqu2msdQ3ZIYk5ZWIC6zzz-_Ff-11CgozTT-c2-L63NZc6UaJKl1Xynd4XQruZp0HPpogiR_6gc41FeBguJAcMIf1MjMz5uLAEHN3kymuPZTpMjmiTDMeIEndTdmx02hixzN3xGFQexeSaLSz0vRSlP584Mb3u8t9JmmIpOQI86-w-Z51wdobHO1m-mY8dFQqG-dP6p8EH1dUAx5y4s%3D)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5affbcda554b4ecaa80b1983b524543a&_e=QsUW3lnLriX8QhDtr0PVl8GSKCvoa1eEx33JZnvHYbmR3tR6EdRq0-BJgTNP1lopf4kKC13sZ-BXHmJt6dQ7wV2lZmZ3aTiCC6djJpXG_zhyw8m23FzKY7hN3ROYzKXQBOvQdgZXJdttX8u-zyl5nzZJbgUuNUhtb70StyQ03sHAtarGJjHmNRuu_4D7yZgMWn4f2L6C11nimbYQc6tGM4e4ogr-z_WrIDllvnTnNX1vvNsbIg-RGemrhmpBZPsDFZLT-0wI-t9cjU_0gwUXTS0-QQdCbjWebeI-TQjIAwpOnLE3CPW8DTY3zZiwIwF3xgm7FmjPjQ48pzGCQrFpaQ_XqaHNKCcVxv-ZwJYNAcqaD3m1Y-fsKZ1UET88z_TM0hZDHvWtDDG_LuhIp5Gk5HMCM7CEvTXq70-MyFYpgR5PnB_B_5HDX35Vhgt5NW-qvmZfBe8LKC5xBbza4mThWwd7HsWPx_EY4QmvO-Om7b4%3D)**

name: Hala Ayala
subject: I’m ready to get into good trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
I’ll protect voting rights as Lt. Governor.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33898165/300287542/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMyNzhlNS1lMGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4h8RZWSi2cIa0yHeDIwNVXXszD4KU7xX1nxpAaQ_xI0=)
---
Peter, protecting voting rights in Virginia is one of my top priorities.

Thanks to our Democratic majority, Virginia is a leader in the South when it comes to voting. We passed the Voting Rights Act, and other essential protections.

As a leader in the House of Delegates, I am proud to have been part of the effort to make Virginia the first Southern state to allow same‐day voter registration ‐‐ _improving turnout among traditionally ignored Black and Brown communities._

**And if you elect me as Virginia’s next Lt. Governor, I am committed to continuing the battle to protect voting rights.**

But Republicans are making it their mission to disenfranchise Virginians at the ballot box. And my opponent is dead‐set on turning back the clock.

It’s up to state legislators to safeguard this process, and I’m ready to fight for your rights as Lt. Governor ‐‐ whatever it takes to keep voting accessible.

[**So I need your help to see this through, Peter. Elections matter, and this one has the fate of voting rights in the balance. Will you chip in $3 today to help propel my campaign to victory in 83 short days? clean_body: I’ll protect voting rights as Lt. Governor. | = Peter, protecting voting rights in Virginia is one of my top priorities. Thanks to our Democratic majority, Virginia is a leader in the South when it comes to voting. We passed the Voting Rights Act, and other essential protections. As a leader in the House of Delegates, I am proud to have been part of the effort to make Virginia the first Southern state to allow same‐day voter registration ‐‐ improving turnout among traditionally ignored Black and Brown communities. And if you elect me as Virginia’s next Lt. Governor, I am committed to continuing the battle to protect voting rights. But Republicans are making it their mission to disenfranchise Virginians at the ballot box. And my opponent is dead‐set on turning back the clock. It’s up to state legislators to safeguard this process, and I’m ready to fight for your rights as Lt. Governor ‐‐ whatever it takes to keep voting accessible. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = In this fight with you until the end, = Hala Ayala Democratic Nominee for Virginia Lt. body:
In 2022, two of the most important Senate races on the map are in Arizona and Georgia.
#
Peter,
**In 2022, two of the most important Senate races on the map are in Arizona and Georgia.**
Democratic Senators Mark Kelly and Raphael Warnock have been fighting for progress -- on protecting voting rights, addressing the climate crisis, raising the minimum wage, and more.
That’s why the GOP are determined to defeat these Senators in 2022. Mitch McConnell knows that he’s only one seat away from the Senate majority -- and he’ll stop at nothing to get there.
**[The one thing standing in the Republicans’ way? Our grassroots movement. Fellow American,

**Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush?** The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans.

**Cori Bush** , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, **but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security.**

Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that **Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting**.

**Last week, she threatened my life live on CNN.**

clean_body: Rep. Cori Bush threatened me last week LIVE ON CNN. Now, I'm calling for Congress to investigate her. When the Fascist BLM mob marched toward my home on July 14th, 2020, it woke me up. It reminded me that our country, our freedoms that we take for granted are indeed worth FIGHTING for. | Fellow American, Have you heard about Rep. Cori Bush? The extremist member of Congress who said that the 4th of July is only for White Americans. Cori Bush , the extremist member of Congress who vocally advocates for the defunding of police departments across the country, but recently spent $70,000 of taxpayer money on private security. Cori Bush, the extremist member of Congress who implies, daily, that Republicans are white supremacists hell-bent on suppressing anyone who isn’t a white man from voting. Last week, she threatened my life live on CNN. You see, the governor of Missouri issued my wife Patty and I unconditional pardons last week for protecting our St. Louis area home last summer as Black Lives Matter protesters descended upon our property and threatened to burn our home, kill our dog. Ms. Bush was one of the leaders of this protest, so you might say she has it out for me. Well, my pardon didn’t sit well with her. She called me an “ absolute liar ,” and informed me on live TV that “ my day will come.” Cori Bush is a REMARKABLE LIAR. She stood right outside my gate with a megaphone chanting “You can’t stop the revolution.” She is the only one in the United States Congress who has vocally advocated for the overthrow of the United States government. Now that I’m running for Senate and gaining traction, Cori Bush is targeting me. She says we can’t stop the revolution, but . letting me know that you stand with me against the Revolution that Cori Bush and the SQUAD are attempting to start. Mark McCloskey Republican for United States Senate | | On June 28, 2020, and then again on July 3, 2020, he and Patty held off a violent mob through the exercise of their 2nd Amendment rights. Since then, they addressed the Republican National Convention, and have been frequent guests on Fox, Newsmax, OAN, CNN and a variety of national and local news and talk TV and radio programs. They campaigned extensively in support of President Trump and continue to speak around the nation on their support of the Constitution, the traditional values that have made the USA the greatest nation on earth, and the current threats to its continued existence. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Mark McCloskey for Missouri 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335 Saint Louis, MO 63108 Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Choose to RESIST!
body:
I just watched Dr. Rand Paul's speech calling on us to resist against lockdowns and government mandates.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W8n0XJnnVQgG4q8qGqFQ6A/qswZARjuTzOO9tW763qM3MdQ)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W8n0XJnnVQgG4q8qGqFQ6A/qswZARjuTzOO9tW763qM3MdQ) I just watched Dr. Rand Paul's speech calling on us to resist against lockdowns and government mandates.

I couldn't agree more.

Our government agencies have wildly failed us - especially the CDC.

Americans have lost any confidence due to gross contradictions like this:
* March 8, 2020, Dr. Fauci, "There's no reason to be walking around with a mask. When you're in the middle of an outbreak, wearing a mask might make people feel a little bit better and it might even block a droplet . . . And, often, there are unintended consequences - people keep fiddling with a mask and they keep touching their face."

Ten months later, Fauci was not only the lead advocate for ineffective masks, but calling on us to double up:
* January 26, 2021, Dr. Fauci, "If you have a physical covering with one layer, you put another layer on, it just makes sense that it likely would be more effective."

And the CDC flat out lied to Americans with this:
* March 29, 2021, a study by the CDC provided "strong evidence that COVID-19 vaccines are highly effective" in preventing COVID infections.

Four months later, that study went down the memory hole and now they're saying:
* July 27, 2021, the CDC released a science brief stating that vaccines were not meant to prevent infection, but rather are highly effective against hospitalization and death.

These contradictions have done a MASSIVE amount of harm, but the biggest harm our government has done is making us believe that if we stay home, stop working and stay away from each other, COVID will go away.

According to most experts, Coronavirus is here to stay.

So, what do we do?

**We follow Senator Paul 's recommendation to RESIST!**
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W8n0XJnnVQgG4q8qGqFQ6A/qswZARjuTzOO9tW763qM3MdQ)
I appreciate his bravery in taking this stance. For politicians in Washington, you never want to be on the wrong side of someone's pain. And in the case of COVID, millions of Americans have been impacted by death or severe illness.

However, even more people have been effected by the social and financial damages of unconstitutional COVID lockdowns draconian COVID mandates. There is no denying, the "cure" has been harmful than the virus itself.

It's far easier to sit on the sidelines and allow Americans to be ordered around like sheep rather than do the right thing and tell the truth.

We need more leaders who will tell the truth, and I'm one of those.

[**Help me get to Congress by backing my campaign today.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W8n0XJnnVQgG4q8qGqFQ6A/qswZARjuTzOO9tW763qM3MdQ)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W8n0XJnnVQgG4q8qGqFQ6A/qswZARjuTzOO9tW763qM3MdQ)
In 2020, twice the number of Americans died from heart disease than COVID. That's the truth.

And with another lockdown, expect that number to go up!

Politicians - both Republican and Democrat - have made America's health crisis significantly worse over DECADES by propping up industries like sugar, corn, processed meats and backing those industries with outdated science like the food pyramid.

We can trace our high health care and health insurance costs back to World War II when wage and price control acts were instituted. By limiting wages, employers added benefits like health insurance, creating an expensive beast of an industry that bleeds Americans dry of their monthly budgets.

Nearly every crisis Americans have had to endure is a direct result of the stupidity or corruption of leadership that was created or signed off on by Congress.

Do we continue to allow politicians in Washington to destroy our nation, or do we resist until we can replace them with common sense leaders who will allow us to make our own decisions?

You know my answer, and if you agree, [**help send me to Washington**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W8n0XJnnVQgG4q8qGqFQ6A/qswZARjuTzOO9tW763qM3MdQ).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. When America finally reaches heard immunity, we'll be in a rebuilding phase like we've never seen while being saddled with MASSIVE debt from bailouts and stimulus checks and our new, disastrous infrastructure bill. We'll need all new leadership in Congress who will be focused on their jobs - not their parties, and not the industries that back them. They must be focused on the American worker and the American family. [**Help me be there for you by backing my Congressional campaign.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W8n0XJnnVQgG4q8qGqFQ6A/qswZARjuTzOO9tW763qM3MdQ)
[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/W8n0XJnnVQgG4q8qGqFQ6A/qswZARjuTzOO9tW763qM3MdQ)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Just. Say. No.
body:
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIzLTFlMWZkY2Q5NTIzODRmNDRiMTA0ZWVkNTJiYmNlYjQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=yobgMbvoF4S0iZ7g_1Ck8g) _If you will not fight for right when you can easily win without bloodshed; if you will not fight when your victory is sure and not too costly; you may come to the moment when you will have to fight with all the odds against you and only a precarious chance of survival. There may even be a worse case. You may have to fight when there is no hope of victory, because it is better to perish than to live as slaves._ **– Winston Churchill** [**Just Say No to unAmerican medical mandates.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIzLTFlMWZkY2Q5NTIzODRmNDRiMTA0ZWVkNTJiYmNlYjQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=bA93u0rcgZ5nGU6eULU6TA) New York, now Washington state... tyrants across the country are beginning to mandate vaccines for government employees, and “encourage” (i.e. extort) private businesses to require it of their employees and customers. There are rumors of lockdowns returning, and mask mandates are popping up again as well. We are watching Europeans – _Europeans!_ – hold mass protests, burn vaccine cards, and push back hard against this medical tyranny. And yet, we haven’t seen that sort of uprising in America, yet... in “the land of the free.” I think part of the reason is that we have a release valve – people can move from states run like dictatorships to free states. But what happens when the mandates and lockdowns are federal? Do you really want to wait for the powers-that-be to take that next step to finally stand up? When it’s harder to fight back than it is now? Our soldiers will be required to get the vaccine by September 15. Healthcare workers (last year’s heroes) across the country – even in red states – are being forced to get the vaccine by local and state governments, as well as their employers. **WE CANNOT WAIT ANY LONGER TO[JUST SAY NO](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIzLTFlMWZkY2Q5NTIzODRmNDRiMTA0ZWVkNTJiYmNlYjQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=jeoGW6n7GExs7lMwdrz8AA).** It is time to step up. All of us must take part. Every liberty we give up now will be harder to get back later. It will not get easier down the road! The first step is to have massive, public demonstrations of resistance. [Please sign up today to organize a Just Say No rally, to be held on Saturday, August 28.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIzLTFlMWZkY2Q5NTIzODRmNDRiMTA0ZWVkNTJiYmNlYjQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=075sOHf4CrW45biUOiRQqA) [ORGANIZE A RALLY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIzLTFlMWZkY2Q5NTIzODRmNDRiMTA0ZWVkNTJiYmNlYjQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MTY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=cGAcD9OiWz2CCBs-71ia7Q) We have resources available to help you organize this and get it done. We will be in regular touch with organizers; you will not be doing this alone. **And,[if you are willing and able to support these protests with a gift of $25, $50, or $100](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjIzLTFlMWZkY2Q5NTIzODRmNDRiMTA0ZWVkNTJiYmNlYjQ4%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvZG9uYXRlLz9mdW5kMT0yNSZmdW5kMj01MCZmdW5kMz0xMDAmbWlkPTQ0MTY5JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=xZIRNgqf0EBIt3QIHpseyg), we can recruit more organizers and help them spread the word and promote them.** Our country needs more protests and bigger protests. Those in power must understand that we will not comply. Please sign up today. Don’t sit by as America slides into tyranny. There may be no one else in your area who will organize – do not depend on other people to get it done. This is a responsibility each of us must rise to meet. Just Say No to medical tyranny! Jenny Beth Martin | |

| | | **BREAKING NEWS: Trump advisor confirms Trump is running for President in 2O24**
We cannot believe it:

\-- Trump and the Republicans have amassed a staggering **$1O2 MILLION** war chest.
\-- His Republicans need to flip just **FIVE** seats to take back our House Majority.
\-- And one of his advisers just confirmed Trump plans to run for president **AGAIN** in 2O24.

**This is an all-hands-on-deck moment. We must stop Trump and his Republicans if it 's the last thing we do.**

**[So we’re calling for 3,OOO gifts from grassroots supporters like you before MIDNIGHT to help us match Trump’s staggering 2O24 war chest and make his plan for his Republicans to take back power completely fail. Can you chip in $3 to defend our House Majority now?](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/p28-)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**
NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com

_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

Please understand: Trump must not be allowed anywhere near the White House ever again.

Not after his lies about the 2O2O election incited a deadly insurrection.

**And _especially_ not after his Republicans have spent months attacking our voting rights.**

clean_body: Earlier this year, a GOP dark money group founded by pharmaceutical companies launched dishonest attack ads against Kim for her work to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Now, they're back and spending $5 million more in new attack ads to defeat Democrats in swing districts across the country -- including Kim. New attack ads against Kim have hit the airwaves in WA-08, Peter. Earlier this year, a GOP dark money group founded by pharmaceutical companies launched dishonest attack ads against Kim for her work to lower the cost of prescription drugs. Now, they're back and spending $5 million more in new attack ads to defeat Democrats in swing districts across the country -- including Kim. Republicans know that defeating Kim is key to retaking the House majority next year, so they're flooding our district with lies about the work Kim and Democrats in Congress are doing in order to flip WA-08 red and take back the House. They'll say -- and spend \-- whatever it takes to win. Look, our grassroots movement is working. That's on top of their massive advantage in resources: at least $32 million raised between Marco Rubio and the Senate Republican campaign arm the past few months. Look, our grassroots movement is working. The Cook Political Report increased our chances of winning, but this race isn't going to be easy. I want you to know my fundraising goals matter: when I can't reach my goals, I risk a very meaningful win for Floridians and our country. And right now, I'm still $9,123 short of my goal, with only hours until my midnight deadline. Thank you, Val Demings \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Team Demings Date: Tue, Aug 10, 2021 Subject: HUGE UPDATE HUGE NEWS, Derek: The Cook Political Report just INCREASED Marco Rubio's chances of losing in Florida – and Val Demings has never needed your immediate support more than this moment. Rubio hauled in $4 million to defeat Val Demings – and that's on top of the $28 million the Senate Republicans' campaign arm raised to flip the Senate. If we can't muster the grassroots resources to catch up, we won't be able to win in Florida. Marco Rubio and the GOP have a head start in statewide organization and mobilization – advantages that could decide this race and Senate control. That's why we NEED to raise $20,000 by midnight to build the resources it takes to protect this momentum – and Val Demings is counting on every single person reading this to rush a contribution: Thanks for your support, Team Demings | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . name: Rand Paul
subject: Meet the next America-First champion and conservative fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sabatini for Congress
body:
Meet Anthony Sabatini... an America-First and conservative FIGHTER who is running for Congress in Florida’s 7th district. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c376%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=GuEe4XfFLfmohbyoljeRDw&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65953%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JWLkNuB6%2bqmmbnHGLbg46g&sysid=1)

Friend,

Meet Anthony Sabatini... an America-First and conservative FIGHTER who is running for Congress in Florida’s 7th district.

[**I am officially announcing my endorsement for Anthony Sabatini for Congress! **](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65954%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bYwZNJQjQa9qPsjktPf3xQ&sysid=1)

_Why am I endorsing Anthony Sabatini? _

Anthony Sabatini is a bold leader in the state of Florida who isn’t afraid to fight for an America-First agenda, the Constitution, and liberty. Here is a short list of what he’s accomplished in Florida and where he stands on the issues:

* Led the fight in Florida to back up my efforts to FIRE FAUCI
* He helped BAN Critical Race Theory in public schools
* Responsible for STOPPING the Radical Left’s attempt to force vaccine passports
* He is unabashedly a Trump supporter and member of the America-First movement
* Anthony Sabatini is proud to be a pro-life and Second Amendment champion
* He believes in the Bill of Rights and is a strict Constitutionalist

Anthony is a state representative in Florida and a member of the Army National Guard. The man is a true patriot who loves our country and will be one of my greatest allies when he is elected to Congress.

[**I told Anthony I would help him raise $25,000 when I announced my endorsement. I am asking you to chip in $20.22, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or more by clicking here.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65965%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cf2syRAgZqrWRhBFLahKaw&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65953%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JWLkNuB6%2bqmmbnHGLbg46g&sysid=1)

_What makes Anthony Sabatini different? _

Anthony’s record PROVES he is a hardcore constitutional conservative. He does battle with the Establishment in Florida and causes Democrats massive headaches.

**The best part? He’s vowed to serve as Nancy Pelosi’s greatest nightmare in Congress.**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65953%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JWLkNuB6%2bqmmbnHGLbg46g&sysid=1)
_(Here I am with Anthony Sabatini, his wife Francheska, and my wife Kelly. I am proud to endorse Anthony and will do everything I can to help him WIN in November.)_

_Friend, I am selective with my endorsements_. I do not waste time with Establishment frauds, candidates with zero chance of success, or people who don’t respect and uphold the Constitution.

Anthony Sabatini is the conservative FIGHTER we need in Congress.

You and I don’t need anymore do-nothing politicians who sit in Congress quietly, vote with the Establishment 100% of the time, and disrespect the Constitution and the vision of our Founding Fathers.

_We need FIGHTERS! Leaders who will stand up for liberty and Drain the Swamp_.

I believe Anthony is a hero of the America-First movement and will become one of your favorite conservative fighters in Congress.

**REMINDER: I promised Anthony I would help him raise $25,000 when I announced my endorsement. I am counting on your help to reach this goal in the next 72 hours. Please donate using one of the links I’ve copied below:**

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $2,900 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65966%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Qz4gcLwO%2bqYblaPoV5gyKw&sysid=1)

I plan on updating Anthony with a list of new supporters in the next few days.

As a personal favor to me, I hope you will make an urgent donation to Anthony’s campaign, so I can add you to that list.

Thank you for everything.

In liberty,

Senator Rand Paul

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c376%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=GuEe4XfFLfmohbyoljeRDw&sysid=1)_

Paid for by Sabatini for Congress
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c376%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=GuEe4XfFLfmohbyoljeRDw&sysid=1)

name: Tim Scott
subject: Uncle Tom. Token. Traitor
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved.

|
---
| | | Peter,

My grandfather had to leave school as a third grader to pick cotton, and never learned to read or write. Yet, he lived to see his grandson become the first African American to be elected to both the United States House and Senate.

So when those on the left call me "token", "Uncle Tom" or a "white supremacist" it is more than just insults typed on a computer, they are words that hurt my soul.

_**[The radical Left doesn't care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they're attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a "white supremacist base".](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4046aa0b398242559eff1b57bc159470&_e=o-H63vIkMvunLUQLqRveA8pNIHaHADnQc3bk43aH8CO9RneU02y_H3LUdhTW2B_P8SmU29Op-EgYQrXq4UUcCMIRP2DluApCrlp23diWkbPBDTN0dvSam0YpO1sf5s1DdZftIka_LYBbtyDsRb-kcvlg_EAo3diqzosqG2XNUvilKU4yDYjUp4QLjfnyHzESB1dhARFwFnO7yIQgZPHFqnadSpFvtE7wuRcNBZz4O2QThu6ROusdz-tQZ8rVFadTgPuejg9W9BsTG2AbkviNSOqIeh2pEPleTvz48gjQY_Af9VVGZ7DBQPftzjM8VyKFsph2VEB649qF6qSouqZ5nUKR11sURuxqPBxxRbOUdm-6-U5HTMgXHnaPRNKkEZQs8s9uLUqTA_XiUJFQ-WPqJKXSB2Sr8nwwLDZZo-hhBxIlJlGtYfZUti9tNXShzZliAy8oEVo0H3tPtRzZpRnkWjoJrpvQbynnoxL61--e7MiN2u-wVWbWiaEg_rF2LPZrJG2pmJHruYeid9MsUUN6_d9RtIv5emb4wDqa7aVgxhQ%3D "The radical Left doesn’t care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they’re attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a “white supremacist base”.")**_

Peter, these vile words and attacks should anger you. They represent the very worst of our politics. I strive every day to rise above it and work towards finding solutions for ALL Americans.
---
| | | [Stand with Me](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4046aa0b398242559eff1b57bc159470&_e=o-H63vIkMvunLUQLqRveA8pNIHaHADnQc3bk43aH8CO9RneU02y_H3LUdhTW2B_P8SmU29Op-EgYQrXq4UUcCMIRP2DluApCrlp23diWkbPBDTN0dvSam0YpO1sf5s1DdZftIka_LYBbtyDsRb-kcvlg_EAo3diqzosqG2XNUvilKU4yDYjUp4QLjfnyHzESB1dhARFwFnO7yIQgZPHFqnadSpFvtE7wuRcNBZz4O2QThu6ROusdz-tQZ8rVFadTgPuejg9W9BsTG2AbkviNSOqIeh2pEPleTvz48gjQY_Af9VVGZ7DBQPftzjM8VyKFsph2VEB649qF6qSouqZ5nVENTsv0mwO-SMjp_ewYllpl2igWn3KsRGNSXYkb9sV9PhkTVBS8mycv_I5eO8B2x-4_NaxUdiFbTzVhX3lH01DZsNgvuUzkXTCiGg_N-9vhw7wpQV5EbJ2YyPJG72ollmGvh_QgKcEa493S1BxzDgRTcJ863y8GItQ4RlTJDWLA314-VjvjEBPC1L3s10pWjm7uIleP-whHPKCfg8ph--8%3D "Generic Button")
---
We cannot allow the Left to get away with their ongoing attacks against anyone who dares to think differently.

My family went from Cotton to Congress in one lifetime. And that's why I believe the next American century can be better than the last.

I know that the insults and attacks I face today are nothing like the injustice and hatred faced by my grandfather.

**But I know we can do better.

Peter, when you read attacks against me for daring to think differently, don't get discouraged. Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. **
---
| | | [Stand with Me](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4046aa0b398242559eff1b57bc159470&_e=o-H63vIkMvunLUQLqRveA8pNIHaHADnQc3bk43aH8CO9RneU02y_H3LUdhTW2B_P8SmU29Op-EgYQrXq4UUcCMIRP2DluApCrlp23diWkbPBDTN0dvSam0YpO1sf5s1DdZftIka_LYBbtyDsRb-kcvlg_EAo3diqzosqG2XNUvilKU4yDYjUp4QLjfnyHzESB1dhARFwFnO7yIQgZPHFqnadSpFvtE7wuRcNBZz4O2QThu6ROusdz-tQZ8rVFadTgPuejg9W9BsTG2AbkviNSOqIeh2pEPleTvz48gjQY_Af9VVGZ7DBQPftzjM8VyKFsph2VEB649qF6qSouqZ5nXK3LV2guxgbSPSUnsCVJbr6kCNgrJqO4ZmqSfdO8kIf6LYfsGBTbAvhCPtFjA6irNK4Vl3JSobf2sA5nTrQyCoBboFebk1LK1xiFRjl_p1v79jT8pWYZ003twMD1LeZkl0AukOB0jn2qdW7OrBfjsAbsm7S65CjXMlerL_RrSRurAkLmnJcLXMIuzngHWYmsIWUDcqBZRAoMPJG2zkxefo%3D "Generic Button")
---
There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream.

I pledge to you that I will fight every day to help ALL Americans achieve that dream and I won't back down from that fight even in the face of hurtful insults from the Left.

Tim Scott

---
|

clean_body: Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. | | | | Peter, My grandfather had to leave school as a third grader to pick cotton, and never learned to read or write. Yet, he lived to see his grandson become the first African American to be elected to both the United States House and Senate. So when those on the left call me "token", "Uncle Tom" or a "white supremacist" it is more than just insults typed on a computer, they are words that hurt my soul. "The radical Left doesn’t care, though; they spare no expense in slinging their vicious lies and attacks. And now, they’re attacking my supporters like you, claiming you are part of a “white supremacist base”." Peter, these vile words and attacks should anger you. They represent the very worst of our politics. I strive every day to rise above it and work towards finding solutions for ALL Americans. | | | "Generic Button" We cannot allow the Left to get away with their ongoing attacks against anyone who dares to think differently. My family went from Cotton to Congress in one lifetime. And that's why I believe the next American century can be better than the last. I know that the insults and attacks I face today are nothing like the injustice and hatred faced by my grandfather. But I know we can do better. Peter, when you read attacks against me for daring to think differently, don't get discouraged. Get Activated. Get Motivated. Get Involved. | | | "Generic Button" There are millions of families like mine across this nation, full of potential, seeking to live the American Dream. I pledge to you that I will fight every day to help ALL Americans achieve that dream and I won't back down from that fight even in the face of hurtful insults from the Left. Tim Scott | | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? . RC

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: What I’ve been up to on the Central Coast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33901269/300297704/-2113420158?refcode=JP_EM_OT_FL_210811_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWYxMjM2MS1lYmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5PJabj5VdWKY1HEexKqS2pYdtDHOhdiz0sTPPHykCA=&emci=381b165b-ebfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=75f12361-ebfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6108787) | Peter —

I wanted to reach out and thank you so much for your support in helping us meet our July end of month fundraising goal. You answer my calls to action at each and every deadline, and I’m humbled by your constant support.

I’ve had a busy summer of traveling back and forth between the Central Coast and Washington. I have enjoyed the opportunity to continue to connect with Central Coast residents again.

I’ve also been working across the aisle in Congress to introduce legislation that will improve the lives of Central Coast residents. Here’s some of the critical legislation I’ve been working on:

**REPLANT Act:** This critical legislation — which is part of the bipartisan infrastructure package — would provide the U.S. Forest Service with funding to plant and grow over 1.2 billion trees within the next ten years, helping to reforest 4.1 million acres of land. This is especially important to us here on the Central Coast as we work to reforest areas that have been devastated by the impact of wildfires.

**MONARCH Act and Pollinator Highway Act:** These two critical pieces of legislation will allow us to allocate funds and resources to save California’s population of monarch butterflies. Monarch butterflies are not only beautiful and iconic, but as pollinators they are vital to our food supply and security.

**Public Service Loan Forgiveness Modernization Act:** This legislation will create simplified and modernized student loan forgiveness programs for young people who aspire to work in public service. Students should not have to take on insurmountable debt to work in public service, and my legislation would help to alleviate the financial burdens these students face.

Additionally, I’ve been working hard to secure funding for infrastructure projects in every corner of our district. I’m looking forward to making much needed improvements to our roadways to make them safer and more efficient.

Thanks for all that you do to support me, Peter. I couldn’t do this work without you.

— Jimmy Panetta [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33901270/300297709/-1064118284?contactdata=gMWLsRr1p%2F0JMTuIIiBpz8aMtHldmz6Hlnn6q7WqLRjzxGH9LIzSOVw13N1wM37ohrtwA0qy8CHOEc1IqppwE0rZu6biiZFteZP%2Bk8zOw%2FnGpl0jrIXjZxkHKh7VhOcB&amount=20&refcode2=75f12361-ebfa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=JP_EM_OT_FL_210811_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWYxMjM2MS1lYmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5PJabj5VdWKY1HEexKqS2pYdtDHOhdiz0sTPPHykCA=)

body:
Peter, There are people out there in the far-off corners of the world who hate everything that the United States of America stands for -- and they have made it their life's work to destroy our country. **But they 're not who I'm worried about.** I'm worried about the people right here in our own backyards who share the same hatred for our country as the terrorists hiding in the caves of Afghanistan. Because when President Lincoln said "America will never be destroyed from the outside...if we lose our freedoms, it will be because we destroyed ourselves" he was RIGHT. The most dangerous threats to our republic aren't hiding in caves -- they're hiding in plain sight in our K-12 classrooms. They're training the next generation to hate our country, hate our freedom and hate our Constitution. _Because they know the generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it, and surrenders us to socialism once and for all._ The Radical Left has been quietly taking over local schoolboards one community at a time -- using their legions of teachers and radical union operatives as foot-soldiers to overhaul our education system right under our noses. **Now, I have bad news and I have good news.** The bad news is that they've succeeded. They've put Marxists in classrooms across the country teaching children not how to think but what to think. They tell students that if they're white, that they're evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they're black, that they're helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. **The good news is this fight is far from over, and help is on the way.** The 1776 Project PAC is the very first Political Action Committee of its kind -- specifically created to take local school boards out of the hands of these America-hating, radical liberals... ...and replace them with men and women from their own communities who share the values and sense of Patriotism that REAL Americans like you, me, my dad and so many others hold dear. **[I 'm asking you on behalf of my friends at the 1776 Project PAC to join their critical work to save our kids and our country with a one-time gift of $28 or more.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116263:J3ExMqlNV:m:1:3253819041:95FE01A79BB430762616D0607E4C4874:r)** I know $28 is an odd amount to ask for, so let me explain... $28 in the hands of the 1776 Project PAC can have more of an impact than a gift of that size to most other Political Action Committees. **The battle to save our kids and our country is being won and lost on the local level -- not in Washington, DC.** That's why the 1776 Project PAC is different from any other group out there... ...and why your support is so critical today. Local school board races are (relatively) low-cost elections, unlike those that grab the headlines every 2-4 years. In many cases, your $28 contribution will have a much greater impact going to work for the 1776 Project PAC than it would for a national race. **Because the truth is, the 1776 Project PAC is doing what the politicians wouldn 't.** They're stepping up to the plate, going state to state, and making education SANE again. My father recognized this threat during his time in office -- and he took Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project head on. We need to continue what he started, and join him in this fight. _Now, I don 't personally know you -- but I know you care about the future of our great nation._ **You might not have kids in school like I do, but it doesn 't matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a stake in this fight.** [**Please don 't underestimate what a difference your $28 could make.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116263:J3ExMqlNV:m:1:3253819041:95FE01A79BB430762616D0607E4C4874:r) God Bless you, Donald Trump, Jr. For the 1776 Project PAC [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116263:J3ExMqlNV:m:1:3253819041:95FE01A79BB430762616D0607E4C4874:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116263:J3ExMqlNV:m:1:3253819041:95FE01A79BB430762616D0607E4C4874:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116264:J3ExMqlNV:m:1:3253819041:95FE01A79BB430762616D0607E4C4874:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
184 7th Ave #106, New York, NY 10011 Not Authorized by any candidate or campaign committee

body:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902260/300300509/-789744066?refcode=em_fr_2021.08.11_b1RR_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTk4Nzg3My1lZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUtmfguNBxYoJKd_esM0fd_ohsJ4L8uFk9KPgPrNwEg=)** **BREAKING: An outside dark money group announced they are spending $5 million to defeat Tom O’Halleran and other Democrats**
We’re shocked, friend.

A dark money group is targeting Tom O’Halleran with TV and digital ads. We knew these attacks were coming, but the fact that they’re starting so early -- and with a $5 million spend -- means they think they can win. [_**Can you add a contribution to Tom’s campaign so we’re ready to go against these dark money groups?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902261/300300510/-789744066?refcode=em_fr_2021.08.11_b1RR_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTk4Nzg3My1lZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SUtmfguNBxYoJKd_esM0fd_ohsJ4L8uFk9KPgPrNwEg=)

| | [**_I’m about to tell you my story of the American Dream and why I’m running for Congress to protect it. This message is a bit long, so if you’re short on time I’d be so grateful for a $10 donation before midnight. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902491/300301670/1129282168?refcode=20210811_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE5ZTNiMC1lZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4SRw3_XZpKEdzUthiEom8sdYQ1-YMIRK325tHxT8Mjc=)

My parents, Lidia and Antonio, immigrated here from Perú when they were just 20 years old.

My dad started out selling hot dogs and driving a taxi to make ends meet.

Eventually my parents found jobs in factories, joined a union, and fought to give me and my brothers a better life.

It wasn’t easy, but they were determined to make it in America like they’d seen in movies and TV shows.

And eventually, they did. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902501/300301671/1129282168?refcode=20210811_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE5ZTNiMC1lZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4SRw3_XZpKEdzUthiEom8sdYQ1-YMIRK325tHxT8Mjc=)
_Tony & Lauren's wedding_ We went from a one bedroom apartment to a house of our own.

We went from living in poverty to building a life in the middle class.

With their support, I became the first generation in my family to graduate from college.

**[_And when I first ran for the State Senate, they were my first donors._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902503/300301684/1129282168?refcode=20210811_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE5ZTNiMC1lZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4SRw3_XZpKEdzUthiEom8sdYQ1-YMIRK325tHxT8Mjc=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902506/300301686/1129282168?refcode=20210811_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE5ZTNiMC1lZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4SRw3_XZpKEdzUthiEom8sdYQ1-YMIRK325tHxT8Mjc=)
_Tony's mom, Lidia, helping out on the campaign trail_ So when I say this run for Congress is personal, I mean it.

Stories like my family’s are slipping further and further out of reach.

I see my neighbors working 2 or 3 jobs just to get by, struggling to cover basic healthcare and childcare expenses, and living without any sort of safety net.

My opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, has had every opportunity to help families like mine.

Instead he’s voted time and time again to block legislation that would have given a lifeline to hardworking folks.

[**_The American Dream made my story possible. But it’s moving further and further out of reach for most Americans. It’s worth saving and I’m running for Congress to do just that -- but I need the resources to run a winning campaign. So I’m humbly asking: will you chip in $10 to support me and my campaign? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902508/300301689/1129282168?refcode=20210811_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTE5ZTNiMC1lZmZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4SRw3_XZpKEdzUthiEom8sdYQ1-YMIRK325tHxT8Mjc=)

I don’t come from money so I rely on donations from people like you to help me win this race.

Because this race isn’t about me -- it’s about our future and electing a representative that will always fight for the people.

That means I need to close my $7,000 budget gap, fund every piece of this campaign, and give our campaign the chance it deserves to succeed.

Peter,

A few days ago, Christy emailed you about becoming a recurring donor and we want to reiterate why it's so important.

Your recurring contributions go such a long way -- it allows this campaign to **reach more voters, hire more staff** , and so much more. Recurring contributions directly impact our budgets and how big we can go with our strategies and tactics.

**_Christy lost last year's election by only 333 votes._**_With such close margins, every single new donor can literally change the trajectory of the election._

**[Peter, we need more monthly donors. As a campaign funded entirely by grassroots supporters like you, any and all reccurring contributions help us.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902657/300302232/603413537?refcode=em21_2108011_reccuring2_S1&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJlYzIxYS1mMGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OMzRHnZoePS4Idhl9MlHP16sDIM2AJutZV1cUML9keo=)** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902658/300302233/603413537?refcode=em21_2108011_reccuring2_S1&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTJlYzIxYS1mMGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OMzRHnZoePS4Idhl9MlHP16sDIM2AJutZV1cUML9keo=) It's clear that Mike Garcia doesn't believe in ethically raising campaign funds. _**We need more leaders committed to defeating "woke" cancel culture and who are willing to put it all on the line to prevent America from ever becoming a socialist nation.**_

Even though I'm no longer Secretary of State, I'm still working every day to champion our American values and helping real Republicans take back majorities in the House of Representatives and the Senate. We are also focused on building conservative state legislatures and governorships. This is a worthy mission.

_**If we all stand tall, no one can cancel the America First movement. This is the fight to save America! **_

Our foundational ideas are under attack more than ever before, and I intend to stay in the fight. The focus, the fight and the desire to win is at the center of my work leading CAVPAC. **We will support leaders of character and integrity who are wholly committed to these same values and will work without fear to build our future.**

If you agree with this mission, I'm extending an exclusive invitation for you to become a part of our Conservative Cavalry!

Can I count on your urgent support before midnight? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902839/300303099/1694321165?refcode=20210811_em_fr_b2_np_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTExOWQ5MS1mMGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWfBSUyTUiT0g3EdJUokrgASRfHPbwtRLzPKgt7Y-TE=)_** News just broke that Trump held a major House GOP fundraiser. He gave a massive speech and raked in $250,000 in one day -- all for House Republicans. **_[It will take an immediate surge of grassroots support to keep up with his haul and protect our House Majority. Could you spare $15 to help me fight back in this critical time? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902840/300303100/1694321165?refcode=20210811_em_fr_b2_np_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTExOWQ5MS1mMGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWfBSUyTUiT0g3EdJUokrgASRfHPbwtRLzPKgt7Y-TE=)_** Republicans only need to flip 5 seats -- and they’re targeting 47 of my Democrats already. I refuse to stand by and let Trump bankroll Republicans and give them a head start. **_[Here’s my plan: I need 50,000 gifts in the next 24 hours to make Trump’s scheme completely BACKFIRE. If 50,000 of my strongest supporters rush in $15, we’ll have the resources we need to keep the House, hold the Senate, and never give Trump the chance to hold an ounce of power again. Can I count on you? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33902841/300303101/1694321165?refcode=20210811_em_fr_b2_np_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTExOWQ5MS1mMGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VWfBSUyTUiT0g3EdJUokrgASRfHPbwtRLzPKgt7Y-TE=)_** Health care. Social Security. Medicare. Voting rights. Civil rights. Our Democracy. It’s all on the line. That’s why I’m reaching out to you once more and asking for your urgent support. I will never let Trump upend our House Majority -- but I can’t do it alone. I need you more than you know. clean_body: | | | | | Folks -- I want to show you something: We’ve received more than 1,370 individual contributions since we began fundraising again last month! This is what I mean when I say that our movement is fueled by grassroots donations. Every single person who contributed played a direct part in ensuring our campaign has the resources we need in our fight to Keep Nevada BLUE! But, as you can see, our donations are starting to take a dip -- which is why I’ve set a goal to reach the milestone of 1,500 individual contributions before our mid-month deadline. | | | | | | | | | | | | | I’ve already got 4 Republican opponents preparing to defeat me. If we’re going to successfully protect this seat in 2022, we have to show them that this coalition is strong and united. Your support makes it possible for me to go toe to toe with my opponents andfuels all of our year-round organizing, advertising, and mobilizing efforts. We’ve got a tough race ahead, but with your help I know that we will win the fight to keep Battleground Nevada blue. | | | | | | | | | | | | Grateful to have you on my team, Steve Sisolak | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for by Steve Sisolak for Governor Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. body:
Assemblyman Chen joins a growing list of Republican leaders supporting Nathan Hochman for Attorney General | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/8bd08b5b2679/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416746?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/8bd08b5b2679/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416746?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/8bd08b5b2679/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416746?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/8bd08b5b2679/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416746?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/8bd08b5b2679/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4416746?e=94837ebab3)

| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
August 11, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.com
---
| **Assemblyman Phillip Chen Endorses Nathan Hochman for Attorney General**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Assemblyman Phillip Chen, the representative of California's 55th State Assembly District, has announced his support for former US Assistant Attorney General and candidate for California Attorney General, Nathan Hochman, in the race to unseat Newsom appointee Rob Bonta in 2022.

In announcing his endorsement, Assemblyman Chen explained: _“Whether it be EDD fraud, rising crime, or the homelessness epidemic, the past year has made it clear that we need new leaders in Sacramento to turn our state around. Nathan Hochman has unrivaled experience, character, and integrity— and will bring a fresh perspective in tackling the tough issues plaguing our state. I fully endorse Nathan Hochman to be our next Attorney General"_

In response to the endorsement, Nathan remarked: _“Phillip Chen has been a bold leader for sensible criminal justice policy in our state. It is an honor to have him join our growing team as we build a campaign that will defeat Rob Bonta and restore public safety to California."_

Prior to his election to the State Assembly, Chen served as an LA County Reserve Sheriff’s Deputy and worked in the Governor’s Office of Criminal Justice Planning.

Nathan Hochman is a Los Angeles native who graduated Brown University and earned his law degree from Stanford Law School. After finishing law school, Nathan clerked for a US District Court Judge in Los Angeles before becoming an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. In 2008, Nathan was appointed by President George W. Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as US Assistant Attorney General overseeing the Department of Justice’s Tax Division. After leaving DOJ, Nathan has had a successful career as a defense attorney and partner in two international law firms.

Nathan launched his campaign for Attorney General at the end of April and has since raised nearly a million dollars—establishing himself as a frontrunner in the race to challenge Gavin Newsom appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election.

For for more information and campaign updates, visit [www.NathanHochman.com](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=37a702d77d&e=94837ebab3) or follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=b3eba4f546&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=4d50b14a27&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=ab710b664d&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=b835daae9b&e=94837ebab3). ###

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33903585/300305135/2004151191?refcode=em_RC_FR_NCdems_081121_gif&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjhiZjIwZS1mM2ZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OMZRBzqEeV5baEK0Lt33L2Ce8TPvXIjXEB_xiAnnEG8=)

On Team Cooper, we know that it’s not enough to have a Democratic governor in office.
Roy needs partners in Washington and in Raleigh who will work with him to solve the most pressing issues facing our state — like expanding Medicaid so that 500,000 North Carolinians can gain access to the quality health care they deserve.
_**We won’t lie: There’s a lot of work ahead of us.**_**But we’re ready** to take on far-right Republicans across the state and elect leaders we can count on.

clean_body: There’s a lot of work ahead of us. | = | = 2022 could be a BIG year for Democrats in North Carolina, Peter. We have the chance to flip a Senate seat from red to blue. We’re also gaining a congressional district and going through the redistricting process, and we have to make sure that our new district maps give us a fair shot at electing Democrats. = Meanwhile, we have to work hard to chip away at the GOP’s hold on both chambers of our General Assembly. On Team Cooper, we know that it’s not enough to have a Democratic governor in office. Roy needs partners in Washington and in Raleigh who will work with him to solve the most pressing issues facing our state — like expanding Medicaid so that 500,000 North Carolinians can gain access to the quality health care they deserve. We won’t lie: There’s a lot of work ahead of us.But we’re ready to take on far-right Republicans across the state and elect leaders we can count on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks, Team Cooper mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. | I know politicians tend to exaggerate when talking about their opponents. We talk about their priorities and what they would and wouldn’t do. You might have seen me say that Paul Gosar would rather pal around with white supremacist pals than work for the people of Arizona.

**I want you to know, team, that I mean this literally.**

Earlier this year, at the height of the coronavirus pandemic that devastated the globe, Paul Gosar missed the House vote on the $1.9 trillion COVID-19 relief bill. Want to guess where he was instead? At the America First PAC Convention, a right-wing extremist convention attended by known white supremacists and Holocaust deniers like Nicholas Fuentes and Steve King.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: A "Code Red" for humanity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62709/images/KE_logo_Final%20White%20bg.png]

Friend,

The United Nations released a report this week detailing the catastrophic and irreversible impact humans are having on our climate. The report called the situation a " code red for humanity ", and reiterated the need for decisive action.

We all must do our part to fight back against the climate crisis that is causing so much harm to our communities. Which is why I'm honored to have been asked to moderate a conversation tomorrow on bold climate action and investments to create new clean energy jobs in Arizona. The event, part of the Climate Action Now: Great American Build Tour, will feature EPA Administrator Michael Regan, Congressman Raul M. Grijalva, State Rep. Andres Cano, and other environmental leaders.

This is the moment to call for bold climate action and more investment to create new clean energy jobs in Arizona. I'm honored to help lift that message now and when I'm elected to Congress.

We still have time to stop the worst effects of climate change, but it requires putting politics aside and taking immediate action. It’s time for us to unleash American ingenuity and innovation to meet the climate crisis head on.

I hope you will join me in this fight.

Thank you,

Kirsten

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62709/images/Kirsten%20signatures.png]

name: Irene Lin
subject: from the 🚗
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | **Good news:** The Milwaukee Journal Sentinel wrote an article about our race!
|
_“The primary election for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin is a year away. Meet the candidates who are already off and running.”_
---

**And they noted the hard work Tom has been putting into the campaign:

_He has been a steady fundraiser, attracted attention with some off-beat videos and sought support among backers of Bernie Sanders. He has also embarked on a 72-counties-in-72-days tour of Wisconsin, what he calls "The Full Nelson."_**

It has taken a lot of hard work from our team and Tom as he relentlessly hits all 72 counties to speak to Wisconsinites, especially in places Democrats often don’t go. But it’s how Tom has been able to win six times in a Trump county and how he’s going to beat Ron Johnson.

August is traditionally a hard time to raise money as most folks take a vacation and break from politics. But not Tom and our team.

[If you are able to chip in $5 to keep us going on the road, whether it’s helping Tom buy a meal or making sure we have enough pens, it will really help us power through these remaining counties!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33903943/300306425/-628206450?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210811_1_1&refcode2=b7487674-f4fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNzQ4NzY3NC1mNGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AbdgXBTqN1ReP-ZQboLHUV3aQDOtVgupJiokeAtzyG8=)

Listen, some folks are counting Tom out just because he can’t self-fund and doesn’t have too many Wall Street friends. _But let me tell you what I know._ We’re running a progressive, grassroots-driven, people-powered campaign. A campaign predicated on prioritizing working families and holding corporate interests accountable.

We’re the only campaign touring the entire state, meeting Wisconsinites in their favorite diner, coffee shop, or watering hole. People can continue to doubt our campaign. We're ok being considered an underdog by the powers that be.

This campaign isn’t about them. It’s about delivering Wisconsin real, compassionate leadership that will prioritize working people over Wall Street interests and deliver our state from Ron Johnson.

[But, being in this race for the long haul means that we need grassroots support every step of the way.
