clean_body: | | Good news: The Milwaukee Journal Sentinel wrote an article about our race! | “The primary election for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin is a year away. Meet the candidates who are already off and running.” And they noted the hard work Tom has been putting into the campaign: He has been a steady fundraiser, attracted attention with some off-beat videos and sought support among backers of Bernie Sanders. He has also embarked on a 72-counties-in-72-days tour of Wisconsin, what he calls "The Full Nelson." It has taken a lot of hard work from our team and Tom as he relentlessly hits all 72 counties to speak to Wisconsinites, especially in places Democrats often don’t go. But it’s how Tom has been able to win six times in a Trump county and how he’s going to beat Ron Johnson. August is traditionally a hard time to raise money as most folks take a vacation and break from politics. But not Tom and our team. = Listen, some folks are counting Tom out just because he can’t self-fund and doesn’t have too many Wall Street friends. But let me tell you what I know. We’re running a progressive, grassroots-driven, people-powered campaign. A campaign predicated on prioritizing working families and holding corporate interests accountable. We’re the only campaign touring the entire state, meeting Wisconsinites in their favorite diner, coffee shop, or watering hole. People can continue to doubt our campaign. We're ok being considered an underdog by the powers that be. This campaign isn’t about them. It’s about delivering Wisconsin real, compassionate leadership that will prioritize working people over Wall Street interests and deliver our state from Ron Johnson. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support. name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: Voting is starting!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Some counties have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now! | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116461:677EnqlNb:m:1:3253819041:49B1D948C94C00CE6AB54BFD5D49BBF5:r)

---
Peter,

Vote-by-mail ballots for California's recall election against failed leftist Governor Gavin Newsom will be mailed to **every registered voter** by August 16th - _just days away._

_**But some counties - including Los Angeles and Fresno - have already mailed out ballots, and votes are being cast right now!**_

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116461:677EnqlNb:m:1:3253819041:49B1D948C94C00CE6AB54BFD5D49BBF5:r)
Even though election day isn't officially until September 14th, once voters have their mail ballots **they will cast their votes.**

We need your help to get the word out and help voters understand that before they can elect a new governor of California, **they must first VOTE YES TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM.**

* * *
**QUESTION #1: RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM?
☑ YES**
* * *

Even **Sean Hannity** agrees, Gavin Newsom must be recalled - _" By the way, I support the recall . . . Let me be very clear."_

[**Voting in the recall is officially underway now - please chip in $25, $50, $100 or even more to fund the Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee's voter outreach and make sure Californians recall Newsom.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116461:677EnqlNb:m:1:3253819041:49B1D948C94C00CE6AB54BFD5D49BBF5:r)

Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58116461:677EnqlNb:m:1:3253819041:49B1D948C94C00CE6AB54BFD5D49BBF5:r)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Biden Can Zip It on Covid
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Florida fights Biden |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f1d87b3175&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

One question I always had: if Joe Biden was supposedly SO concerned with COVID spikes, why is he letting thousands of COVID-positive illegal aliens into the country?

DC just lacks common sense. That's the problem when you assemble hundreds of career politicians together.

Here in Florida, we are showing the country common sense.

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0132600d15&e=afa21b7626), Florida’s 9th District in Orlando. It's currently held by Democrat Darren Soto, who is a Biden lackey I can beat.**

I love Governor DeSantis. He speaks truth to power and governs with common sense- especially exposing the Left and the media for their LACK of common sense.

Last week, Gov. DeSantis called Biden out:

_Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis blasted President Biden on Wednesday telling him to do his job and secure the southern border and not say "blip" about the coronavirus until he does.

"Why don’t you do your job?" the Florida Republican said during a press conference Wednesday. "Why don't you get this border secure? _And until you do that, I don’t wanna hear a blip about COVID from you, thank you_."

"This is a guy who ran for office saying he’s going to shut down the virus," DeSantis added. "And what has he done? **He’s imported more virus from around the world by having a wide open southern border."**

Biden has been widely criticized on social media over reports that illegal immigrants who are carrying the coronavirus are being released into border communities, in some cases without notifying local law enforcement.

The Biden administration has been pressed on the issue multiple times and has sidestepped the question as to why it is pushing Americans to be vaccinated while allowing unvaccinated and sick migrants into the United States.

**Coronavirus cases among migrants have been surging at the southern border, and in one sector the number of infected migrants recently skyrocketed almost 900%.**_

So that's how it is. Biden uses the levers of the Federal government to attack Florida Gov. DeSantis, but he makes it harder for governors, especially in the South, to contain COVID because he's using Federal immigration policy as a super-spreader.

Open borders = more COVID.

**We clearly need to send people to Congress who will restrain Biden and force him to close our Southern border!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=0012e9d392&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Gov. DeSantis knows what he's doing and is leading Florida extremely well. It's Biden who doesn't know what he's doing.**

**Florida had one of the lowest transmission and death rates from COVID in 2020. It's still not in the top 20 in COVID rates per million, and our hospitals have plenty of room. **

"Granny Killer" Andrew Cuomo is the governor Biden likes best- and 70% of his constituents want him removed from office.

_The lesson? Biden needs to be fought, the American people want him to be challenged, and Florida is showing the way!_

But here's the thing: DeSantis can't do it on his own. The Dems control all of the Federal government. We need to send America First patriots to Congress so we can battle Biden! [Help me put a check and balance on Biden and Pelosi!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=78d2ba83d8&e=afa21b7626)

[Will you help me win my congressional seat](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=54ab4622bf&e=afa21b7626)? It's a red-trending swing seat that I overperformed in last year. Florida is swinging red, and people want us to stop Biden's open borders policies!

All Biden has is scare tactics. DeSantis is delivering results. Help me get to Congress so I can bring DeSantis' policies to DC and force Biden to listen!

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c31ba94813&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=5ca7a00697&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=77611f0b96&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=216025390a&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=932d9d8a2e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=932d9d8a2e).

|

**_We will face a choice in our upcoming elections. Freedom, or Socialism._**

As I am sure you have seen... Socialism is alive and well not just in Washington, D.C. but in the entire nation.

**_We are in CRISIS mode._** The radical left has created:
* A Border crisis
* A Crime crisis
* An Inflation crisis

body:
Will you add your name to this card to wish Laura and Mark a happy anniversary? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/33904834/300309253/-1309710229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTFjYjUxNC1mOGZhLWViMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YF0ErJjG7o-7TYNH2cURaUojriRuSCxpLOM_HMMfuNQ=&emci=515b5eef-f4fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=511cb514-f8fa-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9499186) | Friends, Shhhh! Peter,

It’s time for a change. I am ready to be the conservative answer to the Left's failure.

The Northeast is instantly labeled as a "Democrat stronghold" because historically, it was. But, due to the continuous failure of liberal leadership, the so-called 'status quo' has changed - **_people are ready for a new party to believe in._**

If you don't believe me, look at what the Democrats have "accomplished":

1. Inflation
2. Small businesses closing
3. Higher unemployment rate
4. Skyrocketing crime rates

The list could go on, Peter, and this is BEYOND unacceptable. Our elected officials should be working towards fixing these issues –- not worsening them.

It's time we step up and get new leadership in the House. It's time we have thoughtful, pro-active, dedicated servants in office - [**and my promise to you is that I will be that congressman , but will you help me get there?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=693e3c8e28324daeb638df442c48dcb8&_e=Th4aEBKx1gd9Fna6oPFZN4oGbN7ezwphEoOQUO3nqKkSrivDqt2Eucg4-eReFtfRrXkinNvul4I1uLplpi2WqBMe4zr37SwRvLOvTcmOInjCMcqxlZNbU1add_RqjJiOYWBvMqG9JitQKk1cPO0PcRZBPvtr6QtUjS2LLtlGWLtosrIbkSkXyLS0sOWqwJwUb3NcU1nvJe6DGpOAk7USMic2Cf6nwoFcu5t_aze68rYJSM03qsUj8A3uwFV2HfJ4cWh_0K-cu0iVbuSrkee4NHfNCjMoX6nE4kvXFi8t78fjrNBrGc1twYhDX1HXc4_9nCqZudfFn4rWniyxggeOprDMUlCKzhSrNF5P6tG3wluKU03LP8XKZYa4l_rG-Ql-oiF3QL7y2Ppdy5ppDTeBZQ%3D%3D)

| | Good Afternoon, On Friday, September 3rd, I'll be joining 2020 Libertarian Vice Presidential Nominee Spike Cohen and 2022 Miami-Dade County Commission Candidate Martha Bueno to support US Congressional Candidate Mike ter Maat's campaign for Florida's 20th District in the upcoming Special Election. If you're in South Florida, don't miss this special opportunity, not only to support another great Libertarian candidate working to break through the two party system's wall, but to spend an evening with our candidates as well as one of the most powerful and respected voices in the Liberty Movement today, Mr. Spike Cohen. The event will begin at 7:00pm and will be held at the Lauderdale Lakes Moose Lodge in Tamarac. Click the button below to register to attend on Mike's campaign site. I hope to see you there! -Dennis Misigoy

name: Gisele Barreto Fetterman
subject: Peter's eyes only (don't tell João)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This card is *supposed* to be a surprise...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210811-2259-header&t=1&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)
Peter,
I'm emailing you about something *extremely* top secret:
**I'm personally asking you to sign the Official 52nd Birthday Card for João from our entire grassroots campaign.** But whatever you do, don't tell João — _it's supposed to be a surprise!_
[**_Add your name to sign João’s Official 52nd Birthday Card. I made sure to have the team leave some space for you to write him a personal birthday note, so please sign the card now ahead of his birthday this Sunday, August 15._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-john-2021?source=em20210811&t=2&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)__
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-john-2021?source=em20210811&t=3&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)
**[Sign the Card »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-john-2021?source=em20210811&t=4&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)**
I feel like I should probably mention again: This card is *supposed* to be a surprise. I'm not great at surprises historically — it's so hard keeping good news inside!
To be honest, João gets so shy about things like this. For an elected official, he really hates being in the spotlight. At parties, you can usually find him hiding in the corner.
But I know it'd mean the absolute world to him to see your name on this card alongside thousands of other grassroots supporters from all across our country.
**I'm really hoping that, when the team surprises him with this card this Sunday, João sees Peter Willis from your city on the list of signatures.**[**_Will you take just a moment to sign the Official 52nd Birthday Card for João before we surprise him this Sunday? There's even room to write a personal note if you're feeling *extra* sentimental._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-john-2021?source=em20210811&t=5&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)
**[Sign the Card »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-john-2021?source=em20210811&t=6&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)**
Remember, don't tell João 🤫
Gisele ❤️
Gisele Barreto Fetterman
SLOP
Second Lady of Pennsylvania
P.S. While I have lots of fun at his expense, he's the absolute best person I know. So I'm really hoping to make this special birthday surprise a success by gathering the signatures of every single one of his grassroots supporters — _including you, Peter!_[**_Will you add your name to the card alongside mine to help celebrate John's 52nd birthday? Thank you in advance._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/happy-bday-john-2021?source=em20210811&t=7&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210811-2259-footer&t=8&refcode2=2259_434096_ZuJjzf&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=9&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=2259%2E434096%2EZuJjzf)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Josh Mandel
subject: Defend your freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
Peter, **ALERT: My Faith & Freedom Rally in Cortland, Ohio is TODAY.** At **6 PM TONIGHT** I will be addressing the TOP issues facing our great country. Including:
* Critical Race Theory
* **INSANE COVID** mandates
* The **CRISIS** at our southern border

Your voice is the only one that matters | We are launching our OFFICIAL TRUMP CARDS soon, and my team asked me to select the design.

Friend,

I need your input.

We are launching our **OFFICIAL TRUMP CARDS** soon, and my team asked me to select the design. _I've always said the only voice that matters is YOURS,_ which is why I want YOU to be the one to pick our brand new card.

name: Bo Dietl
subject: A good cop under fire for doing his job
body:
Hi Peter, **Bo Dietl here.** You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like _Goodfellas_ and T _he Wolf of Wall Street._ But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115804:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r) Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. **[And so, after all of the anti-cop protests we've seen across the country, I'm asking you to step up and help Jovanny get the best legal defense possible.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115804:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r)** On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. **That's when the two men sped away.** Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. **But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct.** _The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay!_ It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. **[Can I count on you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more today to help this good officer defend himself against these ludicrous charges?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115804:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r)** Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115804:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r) That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. _**And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. **_ **[That's why I'm asking for your help today, friend. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115804:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r)** Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. _In fact after the pursuit, other __officers_ _ found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. _ But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. **[Please, make a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the LELDF right now to help get Jovanny out of this nightmare.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115804:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r)** Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. **[Any amount you can give today will save the livelihood and career of this good, honest police officer. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115804:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r)** [**SUPPORT OFFICER JOVANNY CRESPO >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115804:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r) _More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on [www.leldf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115806:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r) and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ **[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115805:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r)** (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58115807:JikZBqlNI:m:1:3253819041:E48FFB5FA861CF521B4AFB2E68F6504C:r)

clean_body: Hi Peter, Bo Dietl here. You might know me as the renowned former NYPD Detective, Fox News regular, or star in box-office hits like Goodfellas and T he Wolf of Wall Street. But I'm not e-mailing you today to talk about me. Right now there's a police officer who is being railroaded by the justice system and he needs your help immediately. I'm talking about Officer Jovanny Crespo from the Newark Police Department in New Jersey who's facing a lifetime in prison for defending himself in the line of duty when he was face-to-face with an armed criminal with an extensive criminal record. On January 28th, 2019, one of Jovanny's fellow officers - Officer Valerie Sanchez - pulled over a speeding vehicle with two men inside -- Gregory Griffin and Andrew Dixon. Officer Sanchez ordered the men to put their hands on the wheel where she could see them, but they refused to listen on approximately nine (9) occasions. That is when she noticed a gun lying under Griffin's leg - and she could tell he was about to reach for it. Officer Sanchez immediately called for backup. That's when the two men sped away. Jovanny and his partner were two of the first officers to respond to the call for backup. As the suspects ran red lights, ran over sidewalks, drove in the opposite lane of traffic and bounced off of parked cars, Jovanny knew he had to get these criminals off of the street before they killed or hurt innocent people nearby. Jovanny and his partner tried to stop the driver several times. The first time, they failed, and the car got away. The second time, they managed to catch up to them just long enough for Jovanny to get out and approach the car - but what he saw forced him to make a split-second, life-or-death decision. As Jovanny got close, he saw that the passenger had the gun pointed right at him. Jovanny did what any officer would do in that situation - he fired his weapon in self-defense. But that didn't stop the driver. Three minutes and 2.3 miles into the pursuit, they got the criminal driver to stop for the third and final time where once again, the passenger was about to shoot Jovanny. Jovanny again fired his weapon in self-defense, injuring one of the men and killing the other. As a former law enforcement officer, I've heard plenty of stories of cops involved in these kinds of deadly car chases. But what I 'm not used to hearing is about is an officer who successfully takes two dangerous criminals off the street to be charged with aggravated manslaughter, aggravated assault, and official misconduct. The Newark Police Department even suspended Jovanny without pay! It's absolutely ridiculous that a social justice attorney is trying to ruin the life of a good cop who was doing his job and protecting himself, his fellow officers and his community. Jovanny doesn't have any insurance for a situation like this, and he doesn't have the support of a Fraternal Order of Police. But thankfully, he has the support of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund. That's Jovanny and his four young children. If you've ever heard about the LELDF before, then you know that they have helped dozens of wrongfully accused and charged officers mount aggressive legal defenses by paying for expert witnesses, court fees, and other critical life expenses. And Jovanny's case could cost up to $350,000. Jovanny took two dangerous men with extensive criminal background off of the street that night. In fact after the pursuit, other officers found drugs and illegal hollow point bullets in the suspects car. But instead of being praised as a hero for doing the job he was trained to do, he's being threatened with a lifetime in prison and crippling legal fees. Thank you in advance for standing with our nation's law enforcement. Sincerely, Bo Dietl Former New York City Detective P.S. These aren't the actions of a bad cop who wants to hurt people. These are the actions of a guy who wakes up every day, looks at the picture of his family in his wallet, and proudly patrols his community so that his kids can grow up in a safe neighborhood. I stand with Officer Jovanny Crespo - and I hope you will too. More such officers, who sacrifice so much for all of us, will face similar fates unless we speak out. Please approach an officer then next time you see one and thank them for their service! Thank you so much for supporting the LELDF and these good men and women. Please see more about these and our other cases on and remember - Blue Lives Matter! _ (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | | | | ---|---|--- {{unsubscribeUrl}} This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. Democrats just pushed a **$1 Trillion Infrastructure Bill through the Senate.** I am deeply concerned -- this is a completely unprecedented deficit spending proposal and infrastructure plan.

Democrats claim this bill is using already “paid-for money” as funding...

BUT -- the infrastructure package's pay-fors are either completely phony or don't quite cut the mustard.

All I know is that this bill is doomed to be a **_budget reconciliation monstrosity._**

The bottom line: Infrastructure investment is not worth the debt if it’s not really paid for. We simply do not have the money, and our economy cannot handle it.

**Repurposing money the federal government previously wasted shouldn’t count as paid-for. This is common sense!**

**Democrats are lying straight to our faces.** And if we continue to believe their lies, America is headed for straight bankruptcy.

clean_body: take action before it’s too late → | | A HUGE conservative group just launched a $5 million campaign attacking House Democrats. = | = This is URGENT, Peter. Right-wing group, American Action Network, just launched a $5 MILLION ad campaign to destroy our House Democratic majority. Democrats are determined to deliver on their promises and do the jobs they were elected to do. But Republicans only have one goal: clawing their way back to power by any means necessary. And deep-pocketed conservative groups are doing everything they can to help them take back the House and shred the Biden agenda. The American Action Network’s massive ad campaign — targeting 21 of our most vulnerable Congressional seats — could give them the edge they need to win. = The GOP doesn’t care about working for everyday Americans. They’re just power-hungry egoists. Democrats are following Biden’s lead and trying to work across the aisle to pass transformative, bipartisan legislation to help Americans. We can’t let Republicans destroy our progress. = = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country = = * Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. After a resounding victory in 2020, our goal now is to communicate to the American electorate how President Biden’s agenda will both advance broad and desperately needed policy changes and help to heal our fractured political environment. name: John Castorani
subject: It all started at a CIA conference ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life. Thereafter, I made it my mission to defeat the bastards who killed our diplomatic staff Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCm_HcdbQGB5VwE-Hq6RgJx73qhS1t9Jqr-06atTkJmpqFzg2e9L-2WrDKQ7gIeIJ3uHMSJr3ng7JARiKrQ_DlwjufxazbqKCpwI_3wzhyupDShsv1_jiM92MLqMNdeABuQA1VFyy7p8ITxYFLtdFVBZbIkozVji86QTHdXY3WqKgJr49S6dBFXPOsparUy4xyKpPGznnxKorw9zVocQ_S3gs%3D)
---

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCmxflIYiOT0G81kCBWfXLZBbwwcyBYP05Jek6tw-P69vqRtB5HjKHk6iq7tRDFbq_stpUAT-SyKImZPFg6rcLeNZB781bm7BNiRljx4Wa6GEjQNByg8IwulmAK1MUDWZ7_uHG0YXKTeGoHXsORkDp2jH1kChWbfdniHdyf9HmHEENEavhvhrkt8vag_oD4NEjxx-ggeC8JDOyTf3xp_nypQY%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCmzarQ9K8pkpv9CE2YOEouwqJfSdJ-HCu6yqPYY-SOSg_a54OEFjIagyRH89E17zxd7bLnAulTHGA5E6hWjGrjKZOiNr6rI0XpWej5HtplIzZnkyKb1Hq-7yoYnKZWzKW0nMh6GCGIGynO0A6-NB1-8yu63C-UCUqKIyqGmwdWlQhwf8s_uzOqHuQ5S791VpG3jsVeAuZLTyTg0j17kOtCRg%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCm6T6QzncEkaC745QoX69RAlHQ-U0wPOkU9287gGI2pgbfPyXEZbdGvQOo8JVr5JfWmyYI-jaNKRCjS3TRqJXzBClaD6-kwDMOQrh7vmBXjr5TzOiunDwoAgVpPK1eAhyblKCtNAH0qkPy73q2iVUu14CK-2LOwMhzgINgI02mrGemVfhJQTe_08M7VlheROUI2WZUHfXArg4maQ4HdZ4vZQ%3D)**.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCmxMWelIuL-y6W9vIUL_DLoXa5-F8yAUYGj9a8f7uv5F2_kG3jAfX7YRL39RA9k1UqIj5Sgzhoy_SKeCjjBFu77dXLI2vuH9ggSGBOsQsfg7kEVLEaaaJu-erMy7h-rECZsaBietPKCoP_fagN_QhfgCHNOnQMbI0oeGgHTTfCGpBpUx4a1g00Ai67XAYXEadBZUS2o02lcqM95pgIrx8Hc8%3D)
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCm1re9p0Ue7rG8V3xSZ0nqx1rn2V5UMS6raFhN2lNTLQnZM9LCwIot9nVTXwUEdbntJU7LrMg1V-jxbXg9HZlvBbpuGK7rrMYsEHp4OvsM0TgCiaaUnGAc2LyYT_I8uCW7yGiwVybsvV0SCW3ccaDHmZkyvk67ybKgYa01OUmz8HHkQCp-8rBeSNzsbvkEviH8NBU36QByI23enElJUg8jZw%3D)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCm0Q97hYDzM2-mOxzUgc7VzHvhcMiewSBccEOBD5GxAMF6x4QM3KpYHtwhQaf-k2AsItMmoDBzLuMoJ4uQCyufy78jEHjdwwsGrkLRPn-1_0eJwO43wrxFLox_qf-q7WqsXHfHIhwOCKZMDakcLKr4FSgcrt7P44LImE1BmIBqU9wn5DINWf-uMbzgNx1waUxlT_sBWQE0PeFxcGO18ezb5g%3D)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won’t you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCmz-_ZpiVw-TvpjoR5TSX8dcn36-5p-7EtbLbVpldV-IXTwAy_MqRvIy_hxdDG7kgI6edH509CytarIOEYGKtoEGvBPAb3RtQ4QlRaVsEe2mHrNoDWv5d1mPsAVBqc7iAcQDK7W0xcRpQU2eIooOqRxlvf1I9qp0lrQXVbIM9D55WUpZ9lxT1-oNiQJfvKCGp1YJeJbg3yHxZbv_6wqUAxpY%3D)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=6bbfec5b51674abba9e272a0b62c2897&_e=9WP1eRcDk8N7hu-29cr06zoSSRjwXjuTVefjiuhvRTbfmNBNPEXTFAUonL4hq15UEo-Qn5JUoSnax2_k0DV3lOP93rJNa0RJQgeieSQVy-Wu2h6JixhEjKqlJlDCt7obSHAw9_IdD4TF_l3suEVh0MGMCnYgWX_RwaFRx6L6odCYkZerKOfVTxAqZR2ns_-snr_JcF_RuRW6zR2q6kMCVg0T9HxGSAMl5LIxV3lIsDGDjlBxnY-Ata1w73qUJmhb64RnI8vbl-mTIe_N_pKCm7SciRV43V8EsFD32ayhisG8dFeSHax6iqTjM7xGlMd7jcg5APzz2euO6dQ5Psg-8HehLK0bmLMcsTzPjF5IBH7QDuUnY4DN7XdFagtxs8arnSI6mdqgn-eeg7t6r1MYLu_CuM6wFlInwYtKNIk5xvjERK7zPRmoCYgrCgCrETMyGSLj7ADiDQATKNk95hX0QT1lcVlzrBlm2SZ19xI6KAA%3D)**

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a CIA conference focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country. | We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great. I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us! I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas. Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills. But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. . In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces. It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that. In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia Don't want to receive our emails?

subject: “Code red for humanity”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
The data is out there. Now, we know what we need to do.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/WeGZfapDmyH4/WHc1blp6by9GSDgwTVdCeHpoSEQxWVgzcVVIcTFaSG9neVVnUjZIWW9mSmduVTJwdTllMUlQVEg4NkVXNi9XVDA4dlYwRkJtVXI5Vk5IQlpoem5qMStkZ05GcGs4dVVZajBDc0JrQWFSclk9S0/MW1rOUJBUTYvRWpFNDNjMms2bkhVZWZqSEsxUDBIZURHZzNiUWpIN3Q4Yz0S1) Friend, By now, you've seen the headlines: _BBC: IPCC report is 'code red for humanity'_ The UN's damning new scientific climate report, released Monday, leaves no room for denial or delay: Human activity is creating devastating changes to our climate in every region of the world. _NPR: A Major Report Warns Climate Change Is Accelerating And Humans Must Cut Emissions Now_ The UN's Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change report foretells a future where some of the worst impacts of the climate crisis are now unavoidable -- just look at the fires in America's west for further proof. And now, every additional degree of warming could bring more unthinkable threats. _New York Times: A Hotter Future Is Certain, Climate Panel Warns. But How Hot Is Up to Us._ It's worth pausing to consider the second part of _The Times '_ headline: "How hot is up to us." You know that I've said for years that this climate crisis is the existential threat of our generation, but it's a mistake to think nothing can be done. The truth is that bold, transformative action remains possible and would avert the worst outcomes. name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Completing Our Mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We are fortunate to live in the greatest nation the world has ever seen. But America didn’t rise to greatness at random. We rose because our forefathers worked hard to build a better life for their children. We rose because thousands were brave enough to fight and die in the defense of their fellow Americans. Most importantly, America rose to the greatest heights achieved by any country because of a unique set of beliefs and values that we all share. These values and beliefs of freedom, liberty and individual responsibility continue to empower generations of Americans to achieve greatness and success.

Friend, last night, we saw a razor thin, partisan majority in the Senate vote to fundamentally change our nation.

Without any Republican support, Senate Democrats passed a $3.5 trillion dollar “budget” with wide ramifications on everything from our border security to our energy independence to the safety and security of our communities.

This budget would spend trillions of dollars driving us further into debt and increasing the already out-of-control inflation that is hurting middle-class families in Houston and across Texas. Inevitably, to pay for their lavish spending, the Biden Administration will increase taxes on the same middle-class families who are currently being impacted by inflation.

Beyond that, this “budget” funds a number of priorities that are completely out of touch with the American people. It spends billions on Green New Deal projects that would undermine the energy economy in Houston--an industry that is already innovating and providing abundant, low-cost energy. It would undermine our immigration system, providing additional incentives for illegal immigrants to enter our country without ensuring we have the resources necessary to secure our border. It would fundamentally reshape our communities by bringing high-density housing projects to quiet neighborhoods in suburban Houston.

Our government should be empowering entrepreneurs to create jobs in the free market... not stand in their way. It should be allocating resources to secure the border and stop illegal immigration. It should be efficiently building better roads, bridges and ports to ensure our prosperity for the next 100 years.

If we don’t elect new leaders in Washington, this administration and liberal progressives will continue to take us down a dark path. We can’t let that happen.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=e0158c138fb94aad864b771bc5b11743&_e=8xqhc69M1qxW0-YbpMVDvgW1s68ivQDAvdWvoF7giwk258CAszj9OBbC19HLXxVQb53LCSX-phQF06r5AGMXZ5pbehTW_ncG2HuN21oHZSEPEInNeDHIXnSK3v1bV-5J0QSOwNhhQWsgm5FwK87K94zJC0DRwgnW7zpbF7cRRSX5d3jgMNFMiW76Y5zvblUwlY0V7ONOMh8zlCAhsQhCw6b7xfN-qXfkRuaICA6_ZeM5_xcHTMixs8JbRv3it03XSjXvpZ1-Y-z29s7p3Hi2gNilfIBWKFnHrBypjtW_gP0%3D)****

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress

I’m at the Mexico border every day. This is a crisis. I'm running for Congress because Biden is ignoring my communities' plight. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_s=0b9708f4ef6447a9b08229823f4a89e1&_t=yNrSflGOjYCqmsAob3EKWdMXdrGM-zTisx7tXLj8TL3oe-mMZe7IQsouh7V07h6ThbeYp3_--FoJ3aGTuzGw5xfQylrRkTZ5ezSS6d4wHCEvpD6YNcb1Tiv1VgL-xWNZM470FcqSxTyakCjiA4FxfolsGGIs6l7Pbn9h8K_iV7U%3D) | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9708f4ef6447a9b08229823f4a89e1&_e=55GRG5tKcz916EwwM6u2SoIpfV2WpGXtt2MO_uEPVoQMB9NtVvSeJdQtuWh-qlud2ZXBgiAfs1ChX4rgbjPul9rz1oAHRNG-fv6DvncRLJlYmNQYl-6s-S-k4lyzLWdFsw2roeVjPE_OoQN3WC0krdzWHVnL8NsggDn3N9B2U4tn1IgAtfDybiOg0tWpv00nlPuRQh3eyIcc1m7m-mUn29KlG0opxBibvtDqZdD5acUhs0aRWyO3G6q1ftSc3xnmZLa4jQab8HcnrqnnVEKINp6QsbYnvdImhCNm-3TTrToxFuKOsbUAXK4Ql6xlyAr4tm4XSYYWhHt9c-h3l7zxeK8QrzmTso8SKaYyC2CmCaqS25TjY4nFu-Y9qyVLc6VZJQTMf8zgHL0Q6HrjyiuA2hdl9TK174Ya85qWUsNoJ7MfvxWs57IioReHxAm7MRg7gOtFV7BrkiLoLMnU0ieO57dM5KtmHhEEePwmor-84ClVfivYef4up-uFOpAkicNHXF7yfyrYHORtfIOxC2veCVFM2PSS53tk3mfXewlDbqdWDbsdS3AWpXRcjbvMR3GZLweaewFE3hBf5HqKUgdotKHYfCKZPJLiFFHS6RyOtiPQBVv9Nzj869wR-DlfuTh8SEBrL7UDiKsyjYknb07IDtD8HuLNMXJJUECNila5Qvw%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, and I’m in a very unique position to talk to you about the full-blown crisis at the U.S.-Mexican border. You see, I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th District which runs right up to the Mexican border near McAllen, Texas. Though it’s common for folks to forget, there are large communities of Americans living along the 800-mile border directly _affected_ by the Biden-Harris administrations flat out refusal to get their act together and secure our border.

From January to June more than **ONE MILLION** illegal immigrants were apprehended attempting to cross the border into the United States. ONE MILLION. **The mainstream media has been too busy covering the Olympics to tell you that, though**.

And what is the Democrat I’m running against doing to stop the flow of illegal immigrants from inundating our border on a daily basis? NOTHING. **He’s campaigning to get NPR (National Public Radio) and PBS to set up a permanent presence in South Texas .... HOW IS HIS PRIORITY NOT THE BORDER??**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9708f4ef6447a9b08229823f4a89e1&_e=55GRG5tKcz916EwwM6u2SoIpfV2WpGXtt2MO_uEPVoQMB9NtVvSeJdQtuWh-qlud2ZXBgiAfs1ChX4rgbjPul9rz1oAHRNG-fv6DvncRLJlYmNQYl-6s-S-k4lyzLWdFsw2roeVjPE_OoQN3WC0krdzWHVnL8NsggDn3N9B2U4tn1IgAtfDybiOg0tWpv00nlPuRQh3eyIcc1m7m-mUn29KlG0opxBibvtDqZdD5acUhs0aRWyO3G6q1ftSc3xnmZLa4jQab8HcnrqnnVEKINp6QsbYnvdImhCNm-3TTrToxFuKOsbUAXK4Ql6xlyAr4tm4XSYYWhHt9c-h3l7zxeK8QrzmTso8SKaYyC2CmCaqS25TjY4nFu-Y9qyVLc6VZJQTMf8zgHL0Q6HrjyiuA2hdl9TK174Ya85qWUsNoJ7MfvxWs57IioReHxAm7MRg7gOtFV7BrkiLoLMnU0ieO55DC6uNFKShKoqds1bG7AtVHL0IWYHxueuYS8AUx2DTCXoEHOn_xQUcOgDSbTymutoTMAafSa-3vKANbBkUsmiqIc5zKLqzyOH5i5uXCh1IoKxPHziyRjzbinEIdQ-X9_Ny9t9DpoNpK7_PMkpU-QBk4BM3VUpmrEe25KA0HPM4pw0QLDJWK64Zx3mONgBNhb7LV5qaoE-pFkJVt3iKzxMk%3D)
**I want to help fix this crisis with every fiber of my being**. Our communities down here are being overrun while Biden, and my opponent Vincente Gonzalez, are leaving us out to dry.

If I were a member of Congress I would sleep on the steps of the Capitol until Biden and Pelosi addressed the border crisis, but elections have consequences and I lost to my NPR loving opponent by 6,588 votes last year. **[So, while I don’t have an official pulpit to draw attention to our plight, I’m asking for you to sign my petition which I’m hoping will make its way to Mr. Biden’s desk](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9708f4ef6447a9b08229823f4a89e1&_e=55GRG5tKcz916EwwM6u2SoIpfV2WpGXtt2MO_uEPVoQMB9NtVvSeJdQtuWh-qlud2ZXBgiAfs1ChX4rgbjPul9rz1oAHRNG-fv6DvncRLJlYmNQYl-6s-S-k4lyzLWdFsw2roeVjPE_OoQN3WC0krdzWHVnL8NsggDn3N9B2U4tn1IgAtfDybiOg0tWpv00nlPuRQh3eyIcc1m7m-mUn29KlG0opxBibvtDqZdD5acUhs0aRWyO3G6q1ftSc3xnmZLa4jQab8HcnrqnnVEKINp6QsbYnvdImhCNm-3TTrToxFuKOsbUAXK4Ql6xlyAr4tm4XSYYWhHt9c-h3l7zxeK8QrzmTso8SKaYyC2CmCaqS25TjY4nFu-Y9qyVLc6VZJQTMf8zgHL0Q6HrjyiuA2hdl9TK174Ya85qWUsNoJ7MfvxWs57IioReHxAm7MRg7gOtFV7BrkiLoLMnU0ieO50Y95Imo6aiMzTH6kEdByKXG99bCjk1BdOk5OyG5gvGBUZkdjz1uiQ-UBmxdJcD82SpKiBsa6H3EV3C6_DT_-1fmNcqlyn_UtpxzR6CneJSwhPqmOkAHoClM4msH40ZpeEiOWd_VsloE-vEXJsfTVQmFk81HNLJWp-Lh1xXL7rzhsCA5ZavwygcZLFjdPMsKGtymtkx7U42TSizKKLSqarY%3D)**.

**[I don’t know what’s realistic in terms of who would be willing to sign this petition for me, but I’d like to start with a 10,000-signature goal. If you’re as concerned about the crisis at the border as I am, would you please do me a favor and add your name today? We’re desperate.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=0b9708f4ef6447a9b08229823f4a89e1&_e=55GRG5tKcz916EwwM6u2SoIpfV2WpGXtt2MO_uEPVoQMB9NtVvSeJdQtuWh-qlud2ZXBgiAfs1ChX4rgbjPul9rz1oAHRNG-fv6DvncRLJlYmNQYl-6s-S-k4lyzLWdFsw2roeVjPE_OoQN3WC0krdzWHVnL8NsggDn3N9B2U4tn1IgAtfDybiOg0tWpv00nlPuRQh3eyIcc1m7m-mUn29KlG0opxBibvtDqZdD5acUhs0aRWyO3G6q1ftSc3xnmZLa4jQab8HcnrqnnVEKINp6QsbYnvdImhCNm-3TTrToxFuKOsbUAXK4Ql6xlyAr4tm4XSYYWhHt9c-h3l7zxeK8QrzmTso8SKaYyC2CmCaqS25TjY4nFu-Y9qyVLc6VZJQTMf8zgHL0Q6HrjyiuA2hdl9TK174Ya85qWUsNoJ7MfvxWs57IioReHxAm7MRg7gOtFV7BrkiLoLMnU0ieO56j2SuuE5H-xIYUw8n15N4H5bxOFn0KsdvBeJM48bzC8B6izrCIhdO1yowGtCM-jXLaK2wCLJjrVkzbrJib15XE7IG86jEGYBxygJF0ChSzciet0y8tupf53WqTJtDnClflx-SXNFh1fahloT-Vqv2-nTTMrKk5VwcH9pfXvYMeeoaQb_T5AdenIgdC54fjIlN1sxU-CNAGYEfAM4Z-py-M%3D)**

My community is suffering due to Democrats refusing to even try to stem the flow of illegal immigrants crossing into our community EVERY. SINGLE. DAY. Their inaction is taking a toll on all of us who call South Texas home. Take a look for yourself at some of the photos my campaign has taken. clean_body: I’m at the Mexico border every day. This is a crisis. I'm running for Congress because Biden is ignoring my communities' plight. Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, and I’m in a very unique position to talk to you about the full-blown crisis at the U.S.-Mexican border. You see, I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th District which runs right up to the Mexican border near McAllen, Texas. Though it’s common for folks to forget, there are large communities of Americans living along the 800-mile border directly affected by the Biden-Harris administrations flat out refusal to get their act together and secure our border. From January to June more than ONE MILLION illegal immigrants were apprehended attempting to cross the border into the United States. ONE MILLION. The mainstream media has been too busy covering the Olympics to tell you that, though. And what is the Democrat I’m running against doing to stop the flow of illegal immigrants from inundating our border on a daily basis? NOTHING. He’s campaigning to get NPR (National Public Radio) and PBS to set up a permanent presence in South Texas .... HOW IS HIS PRIORITY NOT THE BORDER?? I want to help fix this crisis with every fiber of my being. Our communities down here are being overrun while Biden, and my opponent Vincente Gonzalez, are leaving us out to dry. If I were a member of Congress I would sleep on the steps of the Capitol until Biden and Pelosi addressed the border crisis, but elections have consequences and I lost to my NPR loving opponent by 6,588 votes last year. . My community is suffering due to Democrats refusing to even try to stem the flow of illegal immigrants crossing into our community EVERY. SINGLE. DAY. Their inaction is taking a toll on all of us who call South Texas home. Take a look for yourself at some of the photos my campaign has taken. I guarantee you the mainstream media isn’t showing images like this: **This image was taken just miles from my home | While President Biden and the CDC are encouraging folks around the nation to once again wear face masks, more than ONE MILLION illegal immigrants – who have not been vaccinated – have crossed into our country this year alone. Aside from the obvious national security issues with ONE MILLION illegals crossing into our country, the lack of action to stop migrants from crossing the border has absolutely played a role in spreading COVID-19. We have no federal leadership addressing this crisis, so now being left to our own devices, all we can hope for is enough signatures to get the attention of Democrats in Washington. **. Thank you for your signature in advance, Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez | Paid for by Monica for Congress

name: Erica Smith
subject: re: The IPCC report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Just 20 fossil fuel companies are responsible for 1/3 of all global carbon emissions.
#
Y'all, I took no pleasure in learning this fact:
**Just 20 fossil fuel companies are responsible for 1/3 of all global carbon emissions.**
That’s why, on day one of our progressive campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina, I made a promise:
**I REFUSE to accept campaign donations from fossil fuel companies. Not a single cent!**
Other candidates in this race may choose differently. But I’m committed to building our campaign the right way — one grassroots donation at a time, from grassroots supporters like you.
[**_Can you please make an honest donation of $5 or another amount to our campaign? Send me to the U.S. Senate, and I’ll fight from the bottom of my heart for a Green New Deal and bold climate action._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9164?refcode=em20210811-334&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=334%2E3698%2EJ2JDl-)
**[Contribute](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9164?refcode=em20210811-334&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=334%2E3698%2EJ2JDl-)**
The IPCC’s "code red" climate report confirms what the good people of North Carolina already know:
**We are in a climate crisis that is devastating North Carolina and our planet.**
Just think about the climate hardships North Carolina already faces. We see deadly flooding in our coastal communities, ruined crops and livelihoods, extreme weather and scorching heat.
That’s why I immediately decided when we launched our campaign that **I will NEVER accept campaign donations from fossil fuel companies.**
It’s the right thing to do. But it also means we must raise a lot of grassroots money online through emails like this one.
[**_If elected to the U.S. Senate, I could be the deciding vote on bold climate action like the Green New Deal. Will you please make a donation of $5 or another amount to our campaign?_**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9164?refcode=em20210811-334&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=334%2E3698%2EJ2JDl-)
**[Contribute](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/9164?refcode=em20210811-334&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=334%2E3698%2EJ2JDl-)**
Thank you. Now let’s show our opponents and the fossil fuel industry what we’ve got.
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210811-334-footer&t=5&refcode2=334_3698_J2JDl-&akid=334%2E3698%2EJ2JDl-)**

name: bob@mark4ohio.com bob@mark4ohio.com
subject: Mark Pukita ZOOM meeting, Thursday night August 12th at 8:00 pm.
body:
Hello

It is me again, inviting you to meet Mark Pukita at our next ZOOM meeting, Thursday night August 12th at 8:00 pm.
Lots of patriots are frustrated with what is happening in our country and asking, “What can I do?” We have a simple answer- help to get the message out that there is a candidate for US Senate that resonates with our frustration- and wants to go to work to fix what is broken. Watch and share- easy!

Mark was willing to take on Rob Portman in his re-election as a sitting Senator. Since Rob decided not to run again, many “politicians” have jumped into the race. Through these ZOOM meetings, we are attempting to make it convenient for constituents to meet Mark and get their questions answered.

Mark is NOT a politician. He is a citizen candidate that wants to serve. He is a fighter. It is my hope that you will be able to join us Thursday night. You are a patriot and I believe that you will resonate with Mark’s vision.

Be blessed, Linda Kelly

> Join Zoom Meeting
> https://us02web.zoom.us/j/8272648268
> Meeting ID: 827 264 8268
> One tap mobile
> +13126266799,,8272648268# US (Chicago)
>

Peter,
Neither Joe Biden nor Kamala have done much right in Washington, D.C. However, they did manage to successfully open our southern border and create a humanitarian crisis.

**Now their border crisis is becoming a COVID crisis.**

As Biden pushes mask mandates and government-enacted vaccine passports, his administration is literally releasing COVID-positive illegal immigrants into local communities.
[**Hold the Biden-Harris Administration Responsible**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=063bfdd8e8d44f099cee116923dd5e5c&_e=3gL-tpryqR_YRBLQ2m_8tRWPXnU7pDX7c28h7gOP1go5ivau22DlaknDdafkaKPWOuXnp6sWZImD4jyMUP4hliGywDmzCTvU38WZwagZU_EFHYC1v4WD_d7OquyY-Ck5Uh5J7pHT2Sw2wTGItYSnRKFrwO0DnIP-ZkPbUEO8UeHMqs_hxp7KzUblE5ThFdvF8OKpPifhvkd846wdJ8_l84zUoubK1ok-UtKh-CXuencO-qVkyMfTLFJ-Fh9U8hxJa3SE5jFG-W5oMgb9Z6CA8vEQt7DuzxF05ssZXpjYGkXgnTVogddX3r_8kfP7282gmXgiod6YfsJ1yBpAn4xjbqgyMOLXf1I-07XM3HRrPoIGbPUWjW2o_RuR1O1iuGIQNjm_HCiJRLhajUK36D4Je_ZRGYWyss7n2hwKRvz8jAY%3D)
I don’t think we will ever hear Kamala take the blame for something she has done. She’s too busy laughing off the border crisis or hiding out in the VP Mansion.

However, it doesn’t mean we can’t expose her for the fraud she is! Join us today and expose the Left’s humanitarian crisis. Let us see if they will address it!

-Team Hawley

name: Moms Against Antisemitism
subject: This is hard to believe.

body:
It's been 4 years since that horrific day in Charlottesville. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33908610/300340550/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkNmFlNDAzLTBjZmItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tvg7Co2uS3xlIYmYU6t64ALD1jCBH16_gMc9DwPnBeM=&emci=bdc901eb-08fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cd6ae403-0cfb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) **This is not a picture from a movie but in fact a photo of white nationalists that stormed Charlottesville 4 years ago today.** Hi Peter, Four years ago today, we witnessed one of the most violent and horrific displays of Antisemitism in our country as white supremacists and neo-Nazis chanted “Jews will not replace us” in Charlottesville. Anniversaries mark the passage of time and today it is important that we reflect on what changed and what hasn’t since that dark day in our nation’s history. Just a few months ago, white supremacists stormed the Capitol in a deadly insurrection on January 6th—despite the progress we have made, the battle against white supremacy, violence, and all forms of hate continues today since that dark day 4 years ago. We cannot allow white supremacy to continue to spread in our country and we can’t forget the hate, racism, and antisemitism on display, or let that history ever repeat itself. **[There is no single cure against hate—all of us have a vital role in this fight for the soul of our nation. So, I am asking you today to strengthen your resolve to help us combat all forms of hate in America.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33908611/300340551/561362393?refcode=811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkNmFlNDAzLTBjZmItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tvg7Co2uS3xlIYmYU6t64ALD1jCBH16_gMc9DwPnBeM=)** The Jewish Democratic Council of America is a critical force of progress in the USA committed to justice, and equality and rooted in the beautiful tradition of ‘tikkun olam’, (healing the world). **[Join me in support and help us double down our efforts and strengthen our resolve in this fight against hate and Antisemitism. Chip in today. Every dollar makes a difference.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33908612/300340552/561362393?refcode=811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkNmFlNDAzLTBjZmItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tvg7Co2uS3xlIYmYU6t64ALD1jCBH16_gMc9DwPnBeM=)** Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office **#MomsAgainstAntisemitism** [**DONATE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33908613/300340553/561362393?refcode=811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkNmFlNDAzLTBjZmItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tvg7Co2uS3xlIYmYU6t64ALD1jCBH16_gMc9DwPnBeM=) P.S. I understand that times are tough and if you are unable to chip in today, please**[add your name](https://click.everyaction.com/k/33908614/300340554/-1442804234?fbclid=IwAR1Gc-YeAmua8G0xGauOF0AnaiImJgm7j6gf8bnpplD-6rPjA35gG-4m4MM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkNmFlNDAzLTBjZmItZWIxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Tvg7Co2uS3xlIYmYU6t64ALD1jCBH16_gMc9DwPnBeM=&emci=bdc901eb-08fb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=cd6ae403-0cfb-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131)** to stand in solidarity with the Jewish community to condemn the rise of Antisemitism, and demand that elected officials do more to combat Antisemitism. | | clean_body: It's been 4 years since that horrific day in Charlottesville. This is not a picture from a movie but in fact a photo of white nationalists that stormed Charlottesville 4 years ago today. Hi Peter, Four years ago today, we witnessed one of the most violent and horrific displays of Antisemitism in our country as white supremacists and neo-Nazis chanted “Jews will not replace us” in Charlottesville. Anniversaries mark the passage of time and today it is important that we reflect on what changed and what hasn’t since that dark day in our nation’s history. Just a few months ago, white supremacists stormed the Capitol in a deadly insurrection on January 6th—despite the progress we have made, the battle against white supremacy, violence, and all forms of hate continues today since that dark day 4 years ago. We cannot allow white supremacy to continue to spread in our country and we can’t forget the hate, racism, and antisemitism on display, or let that history ever repeat itself. = The Jewish Democratic Council of America is a critical force of progress in the USA committed to justice, and equality and rooted in the beautiful tradition of ‘tikkun olam’, (healing the world). = Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office #MomsAgainstAntisemitism = P.S. I understand that times are tough and if you are unable to chip in today, please to stand in solidarity with the Jewish community to condemn the rise of Antisemitism, and demand that elected officials do more to combat Antisemitism. | | | | ---|---|--- Moms in Office 13351 Riverside Drive #265 Sherman Oaks, CA 91423 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . It’s telling that the Left is more inclined to strip away the freedoms of American citizens with lockdowns and mask mandates than they are to secure our border from illegal immigrants. Their hypocrisy truly knows no bounds. Democrats don’t think you can be trusted to make your own decisions about your health, but they demand you trust them when they tell you this is not a crisis: Roughly 1,000 immigrants packed under the Anzalduas Bridge in Mission, Texas because our border patrol agents are simply that overwhelmed. This MUST stop, Friend. I didn’t risk my life to protect our freedoms in the Army to come home and watch as our borders crumble under failed leadership while American citizens were put LAST. That’s why I’m counting on grassroots patriots like you to help me win this race and ensure we flip the House next year. We can’t wait until 2024 to end this crisis. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2900 for the primary election, $2,900 for the primary run-off election, and $2,900 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

| Dear Patriot, I need your help, or my voice might be silenced. I stood up to Fauci and the Lockdown Mafia, and YouTube shut me down. Now, I cannot get my message out for the next 7 days. And I shudder to think how much power Fauci might be able to grab while I'm gone. That's right -- I told the truth about the ineffectiveness of masks, and YouTube banned me from uploading new videos for the next week. That's a full week of Fauci locking down and masking up America -- with virtually no opposition. I need a way of getting my message out to America and fighting back against Fauci. And I'm going to have to do it without YouTube. That's where you come in. Fauci is licking his chops, and I urgently need your help to stop him. [Will you send $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so that I can get my message out through alternate means?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DrgCq_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi70-2B5Y905d5w6SzaLljW3JgktHfPoE3tX8jA8Mao860kZulOXO1XpAzb-2F9IEr1AScBr0OEHSZdn0x9fWDEbwjevPvfxiQn7oVQs0GKmYgbI9tVs-2BQJfcFsCsZQBJYErMu3mgnXqsSRzGyqpXZhtCG12jKCaoxqpPoLWhUHx5C0o4wUDZKhciK92GJq-2Fv9nHY2JwzpXxl-2B5REXE2ubSpCvbUUe1-2BBCG5MGzB4N-2BOedjUUo0cyVNgW9x6y5-2F6yzGAEAVKRfP0C50fK69f5mN-2FUHvAv8TZGrnrJDe-2FlSSLGOBz2Ug2-2B-2BQebDw6p-2BFhto9wWG5ljoueKsBfy5FmvAYMK16ww-3D-3D) This is an immediate crisis, and we have to act quickly. I knew this situation might arise eventually. Big Tech's authoritarian crackdown on dissenting voices has been spreading like wildfire. I have a plan to get my message out, but it's not going to be easy or cheap. That's why it's absolutely urgent that you help me out right away. [Can you please send in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately so that I can spread my message even after YouTube shut me down?](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=02bixpj5NQJZaKcsmXY64eerP7KIEnfA2Pj-2F3zl5lv-2F9ueyQdpObefhzAjd7lBz-2B8Eh4dsNjmfsEjZy0jGjQwFzwof7Lz-2BYLxFAXGeTZ-2FxLJw9IjfmGSoO5FuDK-2BM0dlwVEzymAm46U74swmoczLVQ-3D-3DqLjW_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi70-2B5Y905d5w6SzaLljW3JgktHfPoE3tX8jA8Mao860kZulOXO1XpAzb-2F9IEr1AScBr0OEHSZdn0x9fWDEbwjevPvfxiQn7oVQs0GKmYgbI9tVs-2BQJfcFsCsZQBJYErMu3mgnXqsSRzGyqpXZhtCG12vaOsaHJuLWXyI0ie7K-2BsLqvG-2FW74nnqbmDmGnhSktj37hP0y8WTvsw1vTtC-2BHfm4nvwJIIQbKYPATZn36-2FVP5WsGhQbsiLon5w-2B15c2uYLRV-2BmfacZt6lyALhIpNysHWFDNDD4LvAaxgHDLOhfRfoHLPHTqiJNcGEbKkSlE8xhyltEhz1fd2CMku2V0JE3aXw-3D-3D) If my voice is silenced, Fauci's power will increase exponentially. And we've seen what Fauci does with power. His lockdowns over the past year tore at the very fabric of our society. That must never happen again. clean_body: | | | | It’s out of control Friend, Our nation is in grave danger. Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the Radical Left do not care about our Law Enforcement. For months they campaigned to DEFUND the police, even going as far as to demonize them. And now, crime is spiraling out of control across the nation. With record violence on the rise, we must ensure that we always STAND with our Police and empower them so they can keep our communities safe! This year alone, 185 officers have been shot and 35 have been killed in the line of duty. This is truly unfathomable. We need to stop Biden’s Crime Crisis by electing leaders that will always have the backs of our Law Enforcement. Our Law Enforcement deserves better than the Far-Left’s Extremist agenda! It’s time for Law and Order. Thanks, Kelly www.kellyforak.com | | | | ==

Donald J. Trump August 11th, 2021
I spoke to the wonderful mother and devoted husband of Ashli Babbitt, who was murdered at the hands of someone who should never have pulled the trigger of his gun. We know who he is. body:
I am a Black Republican running to retire squad member, Ilhan Omar. |

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=005b9862398b44c6be78e257cc20c259&_e=4DsoP0RzhwOMfgaI-H8NpUMX3nrdcM3BCEs-6DEoea_8L5sc00ZMx7BmA6nNPYdYFo0s1s-LP2t3_I2df7po6cARJJOReUm5Nig9lw07MFTE0QutbvLRgTqXO7ISSt-a62dwMZWAiWVqoYDrd_0KJRquE0hDR5oHGOEOdfPpTG1WVUJwhMc738srhN-41X8SQ0BiTV3ye5XxBwbW5xXKVWyOTSfx_leGiJM6K8hyyvFhsSC_TjGIjl8qo-YjOuNltPUBZVnd7AGv1sBfyPCkBeAESi0tE9SlIjIt84YdMlbHYaG4XzF91K6QmdPjxCkjHIt93IUVGs1SOEUYGxyCIS7faAj84rfA9exK_EAP5NPRwyBY9TiKUOo7WSXiS7VAPIJsEodMB50FOThM9h5cjr_vmIJLMSHMV9lxh38-aITXxrehnjFXrq9uORlmPBddnPVPL1xgMh5UIQyE631PEDauF3kOqkI1Uf_ns7jZLow%3D)

**Say it with me Peter, Black Americans can be Republican too.**
We need to make sure this message rings loud and clear for everyone to hear because so many liberals in our country seem to think you can’t be a Black American and Republican too. You and I both know that’s not the case because I’m living proof of that, along with so many others in our party.

But, if you told any liberal right now that Black American’s have some of the most Conservative values compared to any other ethnic group in our nation, **they wouldn’t believe you.**

I guarantee you that most of these liberals wouldn’t even believe **the fact that the first Black Americans in Congress were actually Republicans.**

[**That’s why I need your help**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=005b9862398b44c6be78e257cc20c259&_e=4DsoP0RzhwOMfgaI-H8NpUMX3nrdcM3BCEs-6DEoea_8L5sc00ZMx7BmA6nNPYdYFo0s1s-LP2t3_I2df7po6cARJJOReUm5Nig9lw07MFTE0QutbvLRgTqXO7ISSt-a62dwMZWAiWVqoYDrd_0KJRquE0hDR5oHGOEOdfPpTG1WVUJwhMc738srhN-41X8SQ0BiTV3ye5XxBwbW5xXKVWyOTSfx_leGiJM6K8hyyvFhsSC_TjGIjl8qo-YjOuNltPUBZVnd7AGv1sBfyPCkBZsDvJ36Te3K34TsUwWEgBM5ccw7BOIpVVyyvRPFTVxWrNePlUgLG92SnukpbwDbq1AA4gqqV3hTfFZVflgKB24frrZiqw1KJYYMFGz_tRndC6bNOgb5FAHJ_LZkWYm0RbnnBzKBOSqDyvufJdrWt0r9jDCYpLPGGAMPj6H8feeP6K-Wwz3r5ewrusvAoo-P26MjyabTHGBYmsPa-Si3q_s%3D) because we need to put a stop to the lies that Democrats have been using to control Black Americans for years and restore conservative principles that can set them free.

clean_body: I am a Black Republican running to retire squad member, Ilhan Omar. | Say it with me Peter, Black Americans can be Republican too. We need to make sure this message rings loud and clear for everyone to hear because so many liberals in our country seem to think you can’t be a Black American and Republican too. You and I both know that’s not the case because I’m living proof of that, along with so many others in our party. But, if you told any liberal right now that Black American’s have some of the most Conservative values compared to any other ethnic group in our nation, they wouldn’t believe you. I guarantee you that most of these liberals wouldn’t even believe the fact that the first Black Americans in Congress were actually Republicans. because we need to put a stop to the lies that Democrats have been using to control Black Americans for years and restore conservative principles that can set them free. Right now, is the time to act. With your help we can finally make the difference that the Black Community needs to be free of Democratic Control. If you want to finally restore conservative principles to the Black Community once again, Thank you, Cicely Davis | | PAID FOR BY CICELY DAVIS FOR CONGRESS FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20Makki?=
subject: I want to Introduce Myself...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2df1fbbadef8/join-us-tomorrow-morning-for-a-major-announcement-5630057?e=c2296cffff)
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=0c6bb5e297&e=c2296cffff)
---
| Peter, This is Amanda Makki - Republican candidate for Congress in Florida’s 13th Congressional District. I wanted to write you this quick email to introduce myself, and tell you about why I take pride in being a strong conservative with a proven record of fighting for the values and principles that make America _the greatest country in the world!_ You see, my life story is somewhat of an exemplary tale of the American Dream. When I was just a baby, my family escaped an oppressive regime in Iran and legally came to the Land of Opportunity, where anyone with a dream and a work ethic can become successful. While some liberal politicians now are working to change this key element of America, back then my parents were able to realize success - and it inspired me to aim high myself. So I did just that. I worked to obtain multiple degrees, became an attorney, served the General Counsel for the United States Army after the September 11 terrorist attacks, and now regularly make appearances on Fox News, Newsmax, and other networks DEFENDING our conservative America First policies.
---
|
---
| I don’t shy away from being a proud Christian and a proud American. And I remain steadfast in fighting to bring back the policies of President Trump that WORKED - like securing our country with a Border Wall, boosting our economy to record highs, and stopping the destructive, anti-American teaching of Critical Race Theory! And for me, it’s not just about talking, it’s about ACTION. That’s why I volunteered as an Election Security Attorney for President Trump during the Wisconsin recount, and recently toured our southern border with a New Mexico Sheriff who showed me first hand the illegal immigration crisis that the Biden Administration pretends doesn’t exist. **We need leadership like that in Congress - effective, bold, conservative policies from leaders who know and appreciate what it means to call this great nation our home.** Winning this district is critical to TAKING BACK THE HOUSE from Nancy Pelosi in 2022. I need your support now as we are in the hunt to take this seat back from Democrats, and return it to the conservative values our great country was founded on.

For Florida and America,
_Amanda Makki_
---
